college_info.college_name: Gandhi Medical College, Bhopal: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Gandhi Medical College, Bhopal:

faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

faqs.question: Is Gandhi Medical College, Bhopal a known college/Institute?
faqs.answer: Gandhi Medical College, Bhopal is a well-known institution for M.Ch., DM, PG Diploma, MBBS, MD, MS courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Gandhi Medical College, Bhopal has a rating of 4.3 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.3 on campuslife, 4.7 on placements, 4.3 on faculty and 4.2 on Infrastructure.

faqs.question: Does Gandhi Medical College, Bhopal provide good placement facilities?
faqs.answer: Gandhi Medical College, Bhopal has been rated 4.7 on placements.

A:    Gandhi Medical College, Bhopal offers Degree and Diploma courses including 1 UG and 33 PG courses. Additionally, it also has Advanced Masters courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Gandhi Medical College, Bhopal has specializations such as M.Ch. specializations in Pediatrics, Plastic Surgery, DM specializations in Cardiology, PG Diploma specializations in Anaesthesia, Pathology, ENT, Orthopaedics, Radiology, Ophthalmology, Forensic Medical Science, MD specializations in Community Medicine, Anaesthesia, Anatomy, General Medicine, Pathology, Physiology, Pediatrics, Radiotherapy, Microbiology, Radiology, Biochemistry, Dermatology, MS specializations in General Surgery, ENT, Orthopaedics, Obstetrics & Gynecology, Ophthalmology.
faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at Gandhi Medical College, Bhopal?

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Gandhi Medical College, Bhopal is up to 464. Good thing to know is that Gandhi Medical College, Bhopal has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like NMC.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: This college needs more playgrounds and good enough teaching faculty.

review_content.Placements: There are no recruiting companies in medical colleges. We have to do a 1-year internship in our college. We have to take another entrance exam for PG in our college. Our college offers medical and paramedical courses.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi on campus. Classrooms are good based on new technology. There is neither a playground nor a place for recreational activity. Mess is good, but sometimes not satisfied. We miss the homemade food taste, but the quality is nice.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is a great college with some good faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Our seniors are the most renowned doctors in Bhopal. Students who graduated from this college are doing great in their lives. They are financially well-settled.
review_content.Infrastructure: The lecture halls are new. During summer, air-conditioners do not work well, so we face a lot of problems. All instruments and apparatus are non-functional and very old. Many required items are not available in labs. The distribution of notices is not up to the mark.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are great and helpful. They are well-disciplined and solve all our doubts. They help us in our academics. They conduct regular surveys on the mental health of students. They are very well-experienced.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Lack of good hostels and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: As it is medical colleso there is no concept of placements here but many great doctors of India have completed there undergraduation and postgraduation from this college. Many alumni of this college have secured seats in good colleges for their postgraduation so in these terms I think it is a good college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of this college is poor. The classes have ACs installed in them but they do not work and there are no fans so for a year we had to sit classes without fans and even after requesting multiple times from college management the fans were not installed. No ground is there in campus for sports. Boys hostel is very poorly maintained and the number of rooms available are also not enough to accomodate all the boys so atleast 50 percent of the boys admitted in the college have to look for rooms or flats outside college.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with this college because of the newly formed 2,000-seat hospital.

review_content.Placements: The salary packages are not fixed. There is a government job bond for 2 years for students who get scholarships, and there is a government job bond for one year for non-scholarship students. Our college provides internships at Hamidia Hospital. The top role offered is a doctor.
review_content.Infrastructure: All labs are good. The library is very good. Our college has new lecture theatres. They have been built in 2020. The boys' hostel is not much good, but the girls' hostel is very good. The quality of the food is not good. Medical facilities are good. Our college does not provide sports facilities. Our college has a hospital.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the reputation of our college in the medical world.

review_content.Placements: Our college educates some of the brightest doctors in the whole country who are well-versed in different competencies of the medical field. The salary package offered for MMBS students is Rs 60,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a 7-floor library. It has a Wi-Fi facility. All departments are high-tech and have modern equipment. Each classroom has a seating capacity of 250 students. All classrooms have digital boards. The mess facility is moderate, as there is a lack of food options within the campus.
review_content.Faculty: All teachers are helpful, supportive, and cooperative. They are well-versed in their subjects and have a thorough knowledge of their fields. The course curriculum is relevant. This course is for 5 years which includes a 1-year internship. One year is for a rural bond.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our college gives very good campus life.

review_content.Placements: Placements are high and can do super specialty in related courses. A service bond of 1 or 2 years based on a scholarship is done by the government.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are well-equipped. Infrastructure is getting better day by day with new classrooms that are very good. College is associated with the largest government hospital, so patient exposure is excellent. College has a gym and sports complex but doesn't have a ground.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are very good. The curriculum is as per the latest NMC guidelines. Teachers are helpful and supportive. Medical courses are difficult you have to study hard. The pass percentage is 50%.

cut_off.college_name: Gandhi Medical College, Bhopal Cutoff 2025: Check NEET UG Round Wise Ranks

description: Gandhi Medical College, Bhopal cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Gandhi Medical College, Bhopal NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 19356 for MBBS admission. gallery_page.college_name: Gandhi Medical College, Bhopal Photos & Videos

reviews.review_heading: This college needs more playgrounds and good enough teaching faculty.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi on campus. Classrooms are good based on new technology. There is neither a playground nor a place for recreational activity. Mess is good, but sometimes not satisfied. We miss the homemade food taste, but the quality is nice.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college with some good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The lecture halls are new. During summer, air-conditioners do not work well, so we face a lot of problems. All instruments and apparatus are non-functional and very old. Many required items are not available in labs. The distribution of notices is not up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: Lack of good hostels and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is poor. The classes have ACs installed in them but they do not work and there are no fans so for a year we had to sit classes without fans and even after requesting multiple times from college management the fans were not installed. No ground is there in campus for sports. Boys hostel is very poorly maintained and the number of rooms available are also not enough to accomodate all the boys so atleast 50 percent of the boys admitted in the college have to look for ...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of the newly formed 2,000-seat hospital.
reviews.review_text: All labs are good. The library is very good. Our college has new lecture theatres. They have been built in 2020. The boys' hostel is not much good, but the girls' hostel is very good. The quality of the food is not good. Medical facilities are good. Our college does not provide sports facilities. Our college has a hospital.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the reputation of our college in the medical world.
reviews.review_text: We have a 7-floor library. It has a Wi-Fi facility. All departments are high-tech and have modern equipment. Each classroom has a seating capacity of 250 students. All classrooms have digital boards. The mess facility is moderate, as there is a lack of food options within the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college gives very good campus life.
reviews.review_text: Labs are well-equipped. Infrastructure is getting better day by day with new classrooms that are very good. College is associated with the largest government hospital, so patient exposure is excellent. College has a gym and sports complex but doesn't have a ground.

reviews.review_heading: It is an absolutely awesome college, with good faculty, infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Almost everything is renovated at this time. Lecture theatres are newly built, and they give a classy feel. Many medical colleges are not having lecture theatres like GMC. Hostels are also very good, and they provide an almirah, a bed with a mattress, a study table, chair, curtain etc. As it is a new building, all the belongings are also new. The most important thing is the awesome lake view from the hostel balcony. Ragging is almost nil in GMC compared to other ...

reviews.review_heading: Review of gmc, Bhopal by a batchie of 2017.
reviews.review_text: New buildings are made, new library new hostels new lecture theatres old buildings are shifted, brand new anatomy department to welcome new batch, capacity of 250 students in one lecture theatre and laboratories, nde cafeteria, new hospital buildings, soon sultania hospital will be shifted here too.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Gandhi Medical College, Bhopal.
reviews.review_text: The canteen and library building are best here, and the taste of the food served in the canteen isn't very good. However, the library is big and spacious, and lecture halls are fine. There are not many sports grounds and only a tennis court. Table tennis tables are available in the sports complex. There are two gyms, among which one for boys and one for girls. The hospital is nearby. Wi-Fi isn't available only if you know how to hack. You can hack office Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best medical colleges in Madhya Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in our college is very good. The lecture theaters, library, hostel, and auditorium are being developed. We also have a good parking facility. The hostel mess is very good. A sports complex and gym facilities are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall improving year by year, right now the very best College.
reviews.review_text: The college has very good infrastructure, a little bit of improvement needed in the mess. Otherwise, everything is very good. Timetable, seniors, everything, Wi-Fi is best. Labs have everything, classrooms, library have everything. Study hard and enjoy your college life in GMC Bhopal.

reviews.review_heading: Strong academics, good life.
reviews.review_text: GMC Bhopal offers excellent infrastructure with well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, and a rich library. The hostel facilities are decent, and the mess food is average. There is good medical support, an active sports culture, and overall a great environment for MBBS.

reviews.review_heading: A Glimpse of First Year at GMC Bhopal.
reviews.review_text: GMC Bhopal is represented with top-notch infrastructure, and although it is a state government medical college, its infrastructure is comparable to that of AIIMS. We have a 24/7 library, renovated lecture halls, and we have the one and only state virology lab of Madhya Pradesh. Coming over to hostels, boys' hostels are the same as you would find at any other medical college. The girls' hostel is slightly better in terms of maintenance as it is made recently. There is a badminton court and sports...

reviews.review_heading: It has really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college has its library; every department has its lab, and a new lecture theatre has been formed with very good seating arrangements, proper ventilation, AC, and projector systems. There are hostels divided into blocks for UG girls and boys, PG girls and boys, and interns. The food is hygienic, as is the water. Some hostels are purely vegetarian, and some also provide meat. On Sunday, the mess is closed at night.

reviews.review_heading: This college is best college in Madhya Pradesh for pursuing MBBS and other studies .
reviews.review_text:
Hostels and college are in very good condition almost all the facilities are present 
But there is one problem that no grounds for outdoor sports. Those people who are very active in outdoor exercise or sports this college is not for you, All the best for NEET exam .

faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

reviews_list.review_title: Great college life but academically not so good.

review_content.Placements: The first batch got passed out in May 2022. So placements are still not started. Most of them go for a drop to prepare for NEET, PG, Or some have joined for junior residency in some private institutions. Average yearly package of 10 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is great. Green campus, Library way too small for 450-600 students. Wi-Fi is available. Lecture theatres are average. The sports ground is there. No gym. Mess food is pathetic. One general store and one cafeteria which is operated by the mess contractor only so it is also not good.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied with our college because of good faculty members and placements.

review_content.Placements: Our college has a 100% placement record, and all students become good doctors. Doctors have a very important role in society. In our college, about 100% of the students from our course get jobs in good hospitals. The highest salary package offered to us is 25 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our hostel facilities are good, and the food served is also tasty. Our college has a good chief, and sometimes, the food is oily, but its taste is very well. The food served here is also same as the food prepared at our home and will be digested easily. Our college has a sports team, and we are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with college. It has a good infrastructure, but it is not worth the money.

review_content.Placements: In MBBS, there are no such placements, and we should just crack NEET PG. The highest or the lowest packages are not offered. Top colleges are in Delhi, where we can do PG or go for other options. All students have to do internships at this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is present here, but we have to pay a separate fee for that. Classrooms are good with an AC facility. The library is pretty decent. The quality of food is very poor. The canteen is also not that good. Sports facility is not so good. Grounds are maintained.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of N.C. Medical College and Hospital.

content.Placements: Placements at our college are good. It depends on the skills acquired by you during your training. Students after completing medical officer jobs, work as junior residents. There are a good number of cases during internships and a lot of students from our previous batch have bagged good positions in PG exams.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has an air-conditioned library and reading room, as well as Wi-Fi access. The sports ground is huge and all sports are being played. Classrooms are pretty decent with full audio-visual support and fully equipped labs, but there are no adequate microscopes, which is a con. We have two cafeterias with good quality food. Mess food is not that good. However, you must eat in a well-equipped hospital with all the medical facilities and a 24X7 emergency room.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Only 3 batches yet but overall 3/5 experience. Not much ragging, Hostels are average.

content.Placements: Since MBBS is a prestigious professional course job offerings are many. All it takes is how you perform in NEXT exam, if you will clear that (college provides library, above average faculty, 70% Environment), clearing this exam will provide you subtle Government job opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are average, but new floors are being added to Senior hostels. Wi-Fi facilities is good (2mbps), classrooms are AC. , library is average as seats are basic with wooden tables, but AC is there. Hostels for first years (freshers) is 4/5 very beautifully located away from senior block to avoid ragging like activities. Mess food is average, but strict actions are taken always by the Food committee and New principal of college. Medical facilities are obviously good as it's a medical college itself. Sports and games are majorly : Volleyball and cricket. As only 3 batches are there, sportsmen are very less. But a huge ground is there.

reviews.review_text: Our college has an air-conditioned library and reading room, as well as Wi-Fi access. The sports ground is huge and all sports are being played. Classrooms are pretty decent with full audio-visual support and fully equipped labs, but there are no adequate microscopes, which is a con. We have two cafeterias with good quality food. Mess food is not that good. However, you must eat in a well-equipped hospital with all the medical facilities and a 24X7 emergency room.

reviews.review_heading: Only 3 batches yet but overall 3/5 experience. Not much ragging, Hostels are average.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are average, but new floors are being added to Senior hostels. Wi-Fi facilities is good (2mbps), classrooms are AC. , library is average as seats are basic with wooden tables, but AC is there. Hostels for first years (freshers) is 4/5 very beautifully located away from senior block to avoid ragging like activities. Mess food is average, but strict actions are taken always by the Food committee and New principal of college. Medical facilities are obviously good as it's a medical college i...

reviews.review_heading: Great college life but academically not so good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great. Green campus, Library way too small for 450-600 students. Wi-Fi is available. Lecture theatres are average. The sports ground is there. No gym. Mess food is pathetic. One general store and one cafeteria which is operated by the mess contractor only so it is also not good.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with our college because of good faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel facilities are good, and the food served is also tasty. Our college has a good chief, and sometimes, the food is oily, but its taste is very well. The food served here is also same as the food prepared at our home and will be digested easily. Our college has a sports team, and we are good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with college. It has a good infrastructure, but it is not worth the money.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is present here, but we have to pay a separate fee for that. Classrooms are good with an AC facility. The library is pretty decent. The quality of food is very poor. The canteen is also not that good. Sports facility is not so good. Grounds are maintained.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good with infrastructure, academics, internships, and social life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. The hospital infrastructure is also good. The rooms are ventilated. The infrastructure of the library, lecture hall and hostels is good and there is also air conditioning everywhere. Plus there. There are grounds available for sports and indoor activities. Also, there is an auditorium in the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: BCA in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning with minor in Robotics in association with Microsoft - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: A standard college for studying with good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Actually, I am a student from the first batch of this college. The first batch of the Bangalore campus is now in the 4th semester. So, the placements have not yet started on our campus. However, the Bangalore campus of the same college is providing a standard placement percentage.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is well.
review_content.Faculty: Most faculty members are very well and friendly. Like in every college, there are some faculty members who are rude, and some are not much well, but when compared to many other colleges, faculty members are very helpful and friendly. The exams are not very difficult, and we can clear them easily if we try to study something. The courses are designed properly. They include only the needed things. The syllabus is well-structured, and even a below-average student will be able to understand the concepts easily.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Logistics and Supply Chain Management with minor in Port Management in association with Microsoft - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Better exposure for learning.

review_content.Placements: I am the first batch in Yenepoya Bangalore campus, I will only get to know about the placements only after the 5th semester. But to be fair during my 4th semester now the college is conducting mock interviews and more practical activities to help children achieve their goals and get placed in good companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: We are getting a top-notch infrastructure but the case is not feasible if you are looking for a campus life, as a student of this college. I am totally happy with the limited campus experience because of my personal choices. For your information, hostel facility is not provided by the college but easy availability of PG's are available near the locality.

review_summary.college_name: Yenepoya University Bangalore Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Laboratory Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College is good. It is located in Bhartiya City Tower 3B, IBM Building.

content.Placements: 80% of students got placed in my course. The highest package is approximately 38 LPA. The lowest package is 6 LPA. 90% of students get internships at IBM and Microsoft because Yenepoya University, which is located in Bhartiya City, has collaborated with these companies.
content.Infrastructure: All is good. The infrastructure is of international standards. The food is very good. The hostel name is Yolo, in collaboration with Yenepoya, but the fees are expensive. Canteen food is the worst, except for egg puffs. The food is good in the morning. There is a break from 10:20 to 10:40 for the whole campus.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning and Cloud Computing in association with Microsoft - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college infrastructure is not good, but the lecturers are friendly and good at teaching.

content.Placements: Actually, we are the first batch of the Yenepoya Bangalore campus, and according to them, we will get good placements in top companies like IBM and TCS, which are already integrated with our course. A lot of events and hackathons have already been conducted by them, so we have good hope in that.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is frankly very poor. When I visit for the first time, it is in a big 10 or 15-floor building with a lot of space around it, but the college occupies only 3 floors. The outside area is not completely under Yenepoya.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning with minor in Robotics in association with Microsoft - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A standard college for studying with good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Actually, I am a student from the first batch of this college. The first batch of the Bangalore campus is now in the 4th semester. So, the placements have not yet started on our campus. However, the Bangalore campus of the same college is providing a standard placement percentage.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is well.
content.Faculty: Most faculty members are very well and friendly. Like in every college, there are some faculty members who are rude, and some are not much well, but when compared to many other colleges, faculty members are very helpful and friendly. The exams are not very difficult, and we can clear them easily if we try to study something. The courses are designed properly. They include only the needed things. The syllabus is well-structured, and even a below-average student will be able to understand the concepts easily.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Logistics and Supply Chain Management with minor in Port Management in association with Microsoft - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Better exposure for learning.

content.Placements: I am the first batch in Yenepoya Bangalore campus, I will only get to know about the placements only after the 5th semester. But to be fair during my 4th semester now the college is conducting mock interviews and more practical activities to help children achieve their goals and get placed in good companies.
content.Infrastructure: We are getting a top-notch infrastructure but the case is not feasible if you are looking for a campus life, as a student of this college. I am totally happy with the limited campus experience because of my personal choices. For your information, hostel facility is not provided by the college but easy availability of PG's are available near the locality.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Logistics and Supply Chain Management with minor in Port Management in association with Microsoft - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am very happy to get admission in this college.

content.Placements: I really don't know about the placement because the college started around 2 years ago in Bangalore, so we do not know about the placement in the college. If we want campus placement, we need above 80% in all the semesters. Placement is decided based on our skills, communication skills, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructures are okay, but there is no campus, so we can't experience campus life. But, the infrastructure is very good with smart class, full-time AC, Wi-Fi, library, all there. I am staying at a PG, so I don't know about the hostel. Facilities and infrastructures are okay, but there is no campus.

paragraphs: Yenepoya University, Bangalore Campus admission process includes registration, merit list and admission confirmation. Candidates must follow the steps below to get a seat in Yenepoya University, Bangalore Campus:
STEP 1: Yenepoya University, Bangalore Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the university. Candidates need to pay an application fee to complete the application procedure.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
Yenepoya University, Bangalore, shortlists candidates based on the Y-entrance exam. Students who are looking for course admission should meet the last educational qualification set by the institute.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation

Once selection rounds are over, the university releases a merit list. Selected aspirants are allotted a seat in the university. Candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

They have separate physiotherapy and electrotherapy labs with all the necessary equipment. It provides a library with the necessary books and facilities. We have football turf, basketball, and volleyball courts.

reviews.review_heading: A satisfied college because of good facilities and infrastructure, and very friendly faculty.

In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Candidates will also require to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Yes, Yenepoya University Bangalore offers scholarships to the meritious and deserving students. While applying for the scholarship, candidates need to keep a few details handy, such as Class 10 and 12 percentages. Students need to keep their scholarship reference ID handy which will be provided by the admission counsellor.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the college and our course.
reviews.review_text: All the labs, classrooms, and the whole of the infrastructure are well maintained. Though food is average and all other facilities are up to the mark. Every year, sports fest and cultural events are organised. A separate canteen and a mart are open during working hours.

reviews.review_heading: Not so happy with the faculty of 1st year, but really good placements, excellent infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, good campus area, good education and patient flow.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is outstanding in our college. Classrooms are digitalised as well as our teaching staff members are well educated. Sports activities are also arranged such as sport week in our college. All the facilities provided by the college are good.

The quality of mess food is above average in comparison to other colleges or mess. There are many sports available like cricket, badminton court, basketball court, etc. There is a cafe and a canteen also.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with all the staffs and courses .
reviews.review_text: Almost all the facilities available in KD medical College like Wi-Fi, clinical and non clinical labs, classrooms, library. The qualities of food available in mess and canteen is good, medical facilities also good, sports and games also occur every year.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good. I suggest this college for students as it provides better education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good in our college. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel as well as the academic section. Classrooms are in good condition here. Labs are also in good condition in their respective departments. It provides separate hostels for both girls and boys. The quality of food served in a mess is average.

reviews.review_heading: An honest review of K.D. Medical College Hospital and Research Centre.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are to be compromised, as there are 2 and 3 seater rooms. Geyser is not available in all rooms, but solar connections are available on every floor. Mess is to be compromised too, and the seating capacity is around 100.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the premium institutes of Mathura.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is overall good, and it is improving every year. It has very well-furnished hostels with air-conditioners, a very well-decorated mess and a big building for OPD only. There is a big building for the hospital, a big academic block and a big building for the library and HR.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college with average faculty. It does not provide great clinical exposure.
reviews.review_text: The hostel provides two-sharing rooms, an air-conditioned facility and a bathroom shared between 2 rooms. Jio Wi-Fi facility is provided for free. Our college provides separate library rooms and a mess for girls and boys. Air-conditioned is installed in the lecture theatres, but it is not efficient enough for the whole theatre. Labs and demo rooms are non-air-conditioned, which becomes unbearable during summer. Our college does not conduct many co-curricular activities. It provides above average...

reviews.review_heading: College with great faculty members, with not a single student failing in the 2024 exams.
reviews.review_text: My college has average infrastructure, with classrooms that have air conditioning and teachers who use mics and speakers. We have hostels for students every year, from first-year to interns, and also for PGs, with two people per room and single rooms for PGs.

faqs.answer: A:    Abhilashi University provides BPharma to students who have passed Class 12 in the Science stream. At least 45% aggregate marks is a requirement, while SC/ST students require 40%. For lateral entry, a Diploma in Pharmacy from a PCI-approved college with 45% marks is required. Both options qualify students for admission in Abhilashi University BPharma.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BPharma at Abhilashi University?

faqs.answer: A:    For Abhilashi University's MSc Agriculture courses, applicants must have a BSc or BSc (Hons) in Agriculture, Horticulture, Forestry, or Sericulture with 50% marks. Selection is on the basis of AUCET or CSKHPKV entrance exam scores. The specialisations in Plant Pathology and Entomology each have 8 seats. Abhilashi University selection is merit and entrance exam-based.
faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted for MSc Agriculture at Abhilashi University?

faqs.answer: A:    For MSc Zoology at Abhilashi University, a candidate must have a bachelor's degree with a principal subject of Zoology. A minimum of 50% aggregate in the final exam is necessary, while 45% is sufficient for SC/ST students. Apart from this, admission requires a valid AUCET score. The intake capacity for this programme at Abhilashi University is 30.

review_summary.college_name: Abhilashi University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has a serene campus for Ayurvedic learning with supportive faculty and practical exposure.

content.Placements: Placements in Ayurveda differ from technical fields, so the university ensures solid clinical training during the internship year. Many students start their own practice, prepare for MD/MS (Ayurveda), or go into wellness sectors. The hospital and OPD experience here builds strong diagnostic and patient handling skills. This foundation is essential for future growth as an Ayurvedic practitioner or entrepreneur.
content.Infrastructure: Abhilashi University offers a naturally serene and pollution free environment which is a major plus for studying a discipline like Ayurveda. Classrooms are well equipped and labs are sufficient for hands on learning. The library has a wide range of Ayurvedic and modern medical literature. The on campus Ayurvedic Hospital gives early clinical exposure, which is extremely beneficial for real world learning. Hostel facilities are decent, hygienic and safe with regular electricity and water supply. The mess food is simple and nutritious and the peaceful hill setting truly enhances focus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. B.Ed. - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied because of the environment and facilities.

content.Placements: Our course is for becoming a teacher. Our college gives the opportunity to join there college as a teacher. Students can also pursue further study along with the teaching in the same college. Our college does not provide any placements in any other company.
content.Infrastructure: Labs contain enough equipment for us. Libraries also provide almost every book that is needed related to our subjects. There is a cafeteria inside the campus that provides good food. Hostels are also good but I do not live in hostel so don't know much about it.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with the study environment, infrastructure, and climate of this college.

content.Placements: Around 100% of students got placed in 2018. It is the best college for education, outdoor activities, and field works. I recommend students to take admission to this college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good with a good and beautiful environment. Digital classrooms are available with Wi-Fi facilities. Hostels are good and are now restructured with more cleanliness. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. It serves good food three times a day.
content.Faculty: All the teachers in our college are well qualified and they have done post-graduation. They are knowledgeable. The course curriculum is relevant which makes students doctors. Exams are difficult. The pass percentage is 85%.

individual_reviews.course: - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Heaven for those who love study and sports.

content.Placements: Placement level is not good. But, for electrical engineers, they have some companies. I have placed in X Perto solar, this is solar company situated at Mandi and but in Solar appliances hand all over India they work in solar water purifier, Solar Power Plant, solar street lights.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. The Wi-Fi facility is available, and labs are free compact classrooms are clean and medical facility also available. There are lots of sports, festivals all these are available at the campus and also have a canteen facility, and all hostels rooms are well- designed with all facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Laboratory Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our campus is very peaceful.

content.Placements: You can also get your degree in a good environment. Internships are offered in multiple hospitals and laboratories. Our campus has good vibes. You have to work hard to achieve your desired goals.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are decent. Hostels are very good. Classrooms are spacious. There is a decent library in this college. Modern facilities are not available such as KFC, Domino's, etc. Laboratory technician and helper positions are available in this college.
content.Faculty: Semester exams are moderately difficult. Staff members are very cooperative. Terminal and final exams are conducted very well. Half-term and mid-term are comparatively easier than final-term. The pass marks are 100. The course curriculum is decent. Exams are conducted in multipurpose halls and strictness is maintained.

admission_overview.description: Abhilashi University, Mandi, offers more than 40 courses under its five faculties including UG, PG and doctoral degree programmes, diploma, PG diploma, and certificate courses. The university offers courses in Agriculture, Engineering Management, Ayurveda, Pharmacy, Humanities, Education, and Basic Science. The mode of application at the Abhilashi University is online. Admission to various courses is merit-based or entrance exam-based. The students of Abhilashi University are eligible for a range of merit-based and need-based scholarships provided under various categories. The university provides numerous placement opportunities to students in top-notch companies and organisations like HDFC Bank Ltd., Reliance Life Insurance, Macleods Pharmaceutical Ltd., Infotech, Mankind Pharma Ltd, and Alps Healthcare Ltd.

paragraphs: Theadmission procedure for Abhilashi Universityhas multiple steps, such as appearing for the accepted entrance exam, applying, selection, counselling, and admission confirmation. Students seeking admission have to clear all of the admission eligibility before applying. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find here the detailedAbhilashi University admissions process:
Step 1: Abhilashi University Application Process 2025

Abhilashi University's admission processstarts with the application process. Candidates can download the application process from the university's official website. The duly filled application form has to be sent either through post or submitted in person at the concerned department at Abhilashi University. However, the application and entrance test fee will be paid online and candidates have to attach the pay slip along with the two copies of the online bank challan with the application form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Admission to all the UG and PG courses at Abhilashi University is entrance and merit-based, depending on the course. Candidates have to qualify for either university-level or state-level entrance exams, such as AUCET PG, NEET for the selection of respective classes. Admission to the BA programme at the university is merit-based
Step 3: Merit List Release & Counselling

After the completion of all the selection rounds, candidates have to appear for the counselling process for the respective courses. Later on, the university will release the merit list in various rounds of the selected candidates. Students who find their names on the merit list need to pay a certain amount ofAbhilashi University feeto secure their seats.

courses_data.description: Abhilashi University offers a regular Master of Science (MSc) programme in a full-time mode. The university offers this programme in three specialisation of two-year duration each. The table below lists the eligibility and other important details of the course: Specialisation Eligibility Seat Intake Zoology Bachelor's degree with Zoology as one of the main subjects of study and 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ST) in the final examination along with valid AUCET score 30 Agriculture- Plant Pathology BSc or BSc (Hons) with at least 50% aggregate in Agriculture/ Forestry/ Sericulture/ Horticulture and a valid AUCET/ CSKHPKV score 8 Agriculture- Entomology BSc or BSc (Hons) in Agriculture/ Horticulture/ Forestry/ Sericulture with at least 50% aggregate along with AUCET/ CSKHPKV score 8

faqs.question: What MSc specialisations are offered at Abhilashi University?
faqs.answer: Abhilashi University provides MSc in Zoology, Agriculture-Plant Pathology, and Agriculture-Entomology. All the programmes are two-year full-time with minimal seat intake. There are 30 seats for Zoology,  8 seats for Plant Pathology, and 8 seats for Entomology. Students will also need to pass the necessary entrance exams for admission into Abhilashi University MSc programmes.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MSc Zoology at Abhilashi University?
faqs.answer: For MSc Zoology at Abhilashi University, a candidate must have a bachelor's degree with a principal subject of Zoology. A minimum of 50% aggregate in the final exam is necessary, while 45% is sufficient for SC/ST students. Apart from this, admission requires a valid AUCET score. The intake capacity for this programme at Abhilashi University is 30.

faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted for MSc Agriculture at Abhilashi University?
faqs.answer: For Abhilashi University's MSc Agriculture courses, applicants must have a BSc or BSc (Hons) in Agriculture, Horticulture, Forestry, or Sericulture with 50% marks. Selection is on the basis of AUCET or CSKHPKV entrance exam scores. The specialisations in Plant Pathology and Entomology each have 8 seats. Abhilashi University selection is merit and entrance exam-based.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does Abhilashi University accept for admission to BPharma course?
faqs.answer: Abhilashi University acceptsAndhra University Common Entrance Test entrance examfor its BPharma course. The university also accepts direct admission to second year of the cousre. Admission to the UG-level course is entirely based on candidates performance in the last qualifying exam and AUCET scores. faqs.question: What is the starting salary after doing MBA from Abhilashi University?
faqs.answer: The starting salary after doing MBA from Abhilashi University usually range from INR 5 to 30 LPA as per the chosen MBA specialization. Finance, marketing, general management, business analytics, and entrepreneurship are among the top MBA specialisations that frequently yield the greatest pay after graduation. The highest-paying positions in India after an MBA range from INR 5 to 30 LPA. For the fresher of just within a year in the industry, the median salary range stands at INR 302,326 per annum . On the other hand, with more experience of between 5-9 years, the median salary per annum is about INR 719,315 per annum . With other experience levels, you stand to earn more with position attained in the company and the status of the particular company too playing a part. Top 10 companies hiring after the course. There are a whole lot of places to work as an MBA holder. Virtually all sectors will one time or the other place adverts for vacancies. Some of them in the top 10 are: Aditya Birla Group HCL technologies JPMorgan Chase New Gen Software IEEE corporate National Textile Corporation Ltd. Amazon seller Services Pvt. Ltd. Cisco Systems, Inc. Global Eagle Entertainment India Infrastructure Finance Company Ltd.

hostel.description: University hostels are well furnished, spacious, clean with excellent hygienic, modern style rooms.All Rooms are properly ventilated, spacious and equipped with separate beds, study tables and cupboards and also having the facility of common room with all amenities like television, newspapers and magazines.

library.description: Abhilashi University has a fully equipped library which runs on automated software. It is housed in its own building and located centrally in the campus. It feeds all types of readers by getting issued the books whereas journals, magazines and copies of the articles are for consultation in the library. The University library is equipped with the text books, reference books and research journals of di?erent subjects. Access to online journals is through INFLIBNET and DELNET. The new relevant books are being added to the library stock regularly. The regular timings of the library are extended as per the demands of the students. Another unit of library has been opened in the Abhilashi Ayurvedic College and Research Institute (A Department of Abhilashi University). Working hours of the library are from 10 am to 6 pm on every working day, except Sundays and national holidays. All the students, employees and authorities of the University are the members of the library.

reviews.review_heading: It has a serene campus for Ayurvedic learning with supportive faculty and practical exposure.
reviews.review_text: Abhilashi University offers a naturally serene and pollution free environment which is a major plus for studying a discipline like Ayurveda. Classrooms are well equipped and labs are sufficient for hands on learning. The library has a wide range of Ayurvedic and modern medical literature. The on campus Ayurvedic Hospital gives early clinical exposure, which is extremely beneficial for real world learning. Hostel facilities are decent, hygienic and safe with regular electricity and water supply. ...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the environment and facilities.
reviews.review_text:
Labs contain enough equipment for us. Libraries also provide almost every book that is needed related to our subjects. 
There is a cafeteria inside the campus that provides good food.
Hostels are also good but I do not live in hostel so don't know much about it.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the study environment, infrastructure, and climate of this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good with a good and beautiful environment. Digital classrooms are available with Wi-Fi facilities. Hostels are good and are now restructured with more cleanliness. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. It serves good food three times a day.

reviews.review_heading: Heaven for those who love study and sports.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The Wi-Fi facility is available, and labs are free compact classrooms are clean and medical facility also available. There are lots of sports, festivals all these are available at the campus and also have a canteen facility, and all hostels rooms are well- designed with all facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our campus is very peaceful.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are decent. Hostels are very good. Classrooms are spacious. There is a decent library in this college. Modern facilities are not available such as KFC, Domino's, etc. Laboratory technician and helper positions are available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are not qualified, good placements for all the students, infrastructure was good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were well maintained there. All the important items were present. Wi-Fi facilities were not available there. There was a well-maintained Library where all books were available. Labs were properly maintained and all the chemicals were available there.

reviews.review_heading: Agriculture is the best course for this era.
reviews.review_text: Quality food should be given in our institute and the quality of games should also be improved. WiFi is available for the students and labs are also updated. All the needful facilities are provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Abhilashi University is a good university.
reviews.review_text: Everything on the campus was good, and we had many facilities like a library and a huge ground. The food served in the canteen was tasty and good for health. Everything on the campus was very good. Wi-Fi was the only thing which was not provided. But it is essential to learn things.

reviews_list.review_title: Very nice and satisfying college.

review_content.Placements: Based on NEET results admissions are processed. The all India rank decides the entry into college. Internship amount is not given to students and PG preparation is taken. But for internship you have good opportunity. After clearing NEET PG good college can be taken. This is private college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are well-equipped. Classrooms are very good and library is also there to study. Hostel facility is good. Each hostel has it's own mess. And also food is tasty. All medical facilities are present. Sports and games clubs are there. Canteen is also there.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, exposure and good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: After graduation we can apply for jobs in college itself. Otherwise college have no role in placements. Every year the graduation batch gets job of atleast Rs.80000 a month. College provide one ear internship for each and every student but without stipend.
review_content.Infrastructure: Fully equipped classrooms, library, sports stadium, indoor games, laboratory and fully functional multispeciality hospital, 3-4 canteens, hostels are very nice. There are separate buildings and the college have a multi-storey parking which is very good.

overview_faqs.question: Is MGM Medical College and Hospital, Aurangabad a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: MGM Medical College and Hospital, Aurangabad is a well-known institution for DM, M.Ch., PG Diploma, MD, MS, MBBS, GNM courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, MGM Medical College and Hospital, Aurangabad has a rating of 4.6 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.3 on campuslife, 4.7 on placements, 5 on faculty and 4.3 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: MGM Medical College and Hospital, Aurangabad Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good hospital, patient flow is good, and also infrastructure and faculty members are also good.

content.Placements: The lowest package is around INR 30,000 per month, and the highest is around INR 65,000. It really depends on the PG branch we are doing. After completing our final year, we'll have to do a one-year internship at the same college. The internship is compulsory, and the stipend is INR 18,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure and the hospital is well-equipped. The hospital is a tertiary care center, so it has almost all care facilities. The college has a very good library and a skill lab with mannequins so that students can practice clinical procedures.The hostel has quite good facilities.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: One of the best college in sense of study, infrastructure and laboratories.

content.Placements: Nearly half of the 150 students got selected for postgraduation (MD/MS) within 2 years of completing MBBS. Most of them are getting INR 40,000 per month after completing MBBS. Average package offered is between INR 5 to INR 6 Lacs as fresher. Top roles offered were general duty officers, medical officers and tutors.
content.Infrastructure: I can proudly say they have best infrastructure. All the labs are very nicely structured. Enough resources for students to learn and do experiments independently. Well ventilated classrooms. Best audio visual aids for students to learn. State of the art library and reading rooms. Online medical journals from top institutes all over the world are available for students. Hostels are very neat and clean with yummy food in mess and canteens. Overall it is one of the best in India. All the teaching faculty is dedicated for students.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Very nice and satisfying college.

content.Placements: Based on NEET results admissions are processed. The all India rank decides the entry into college. Internship amount is not given to students and PG preparation is taken. But for internship you have good opportunity. After clearing NEET PG good college can be taken. This is private college.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are well-equipped. Classrooms are very good and library is also there to study. Hostel facility is good. Each hostel has it's own mess. And also food is tasty. All medical facilities are present. Sports and games clubs are there. Canteen is also there.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, exposure and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: After graduation we can apply for jobs in college itself. Otherwise college have no role in placements. Every year the graduation batch gets job of atleast Rs.80000 a month. College provide one ear internship for each and every student but without stipend.
content.Infrastructure: Fully equipped classrooms, library, sports stadium, indoor games, laboratory and fully functional multispeciality hospital, 3-4 canteens, hostels are very nice. There are separate buildings and the college have a multi-storey parking which is very good.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good college need to improve on campus

content.Placements: We were a batch of 200 but since we were divided in groups we had better teach student interaction. Teachers r kind and helpful. Facilities are good. According to the fees being 21 lacks per year the teaching staff and facilities are amazing. Teachers take a lot of effort.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is small. Shared canteen with the hospital patients. No place to sit on campus. The library is really well developed has book lending facility full ac hall to study. Rest lecture hall is good and air conditioned but the rest of classrooms are congested.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Mahatma Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Wardha offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as MBBS. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MD, MS and PG Diploma. MGIMS Wardha courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for MGIMS Wardha courses stands around INR 7,51,800 to 12,10,545.

review_content.General: Laboratories are good for practical purposes. Every year, all sports activities are conducted by sports authorities. Our campus has air conditioners, a gym, a basketball court, a volleyball court, a badminton court, and a cricket ground. The hostel facilities are very good, and it provides a single room for every student. The hostel also provides solar water heaters and washing machines. Free Wi-Fi is available, and the speed is very high.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good and strict college.

review_content.Placements: Placements in this college are above 90%. Everyone had a compulsory internship period of 1 year. The salary offered varies but is always above Rs.40000 per month. The internship package is Rs.8000 per month. Roles offered in our course in three camps such as orientation camp, social service camp and ROME camp.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library in our college has Wi-Fi and e-resources. Our college has the best infrastructure among medical colleges. Hostels provides single room per student but are extremely old. Mess food is claimed healthy but tasteless. The canteen food is cheap in price and in quality. Insects and snakes may bother you in the hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best central government medical college in Maharashtra.

review_content.Placements: As it is an MBBS college, the placement rate is almost 100%. Students can join any private hospital or join any government medical hospital at a primary health centre as a medical officer. Many private hospitals in Wardha offer jobs to MBBS students. The average salary starts from 45,000 to 75,000 per month, depending on the location.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. The hospital is huge and spacious. Wi-Fi facilities are available all over. Medical facilities and medical store are available within the campus. Labs are well-equipped with instruments and specimens. Classrooms are spacious enough for 100 students, and the library is one of the best among all medical colleges. Canteen food is okay with average quality food.

review_summary.college_name: MGIMS Wardha Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall, this college is best for medical aspirants.

content.Placements: A total of 100 seats are available for NEET UG students in this college. After completing 5 year of MBBS course, you get a package ranging from 10-13 LPA at the starting which will increase every year. 1 year of internship is necessary after the completion of 4 years.
content.Infrastructure: A single room is allotted to every student, which is not found in any other government college. Food in the mess is much better than any other mess. Three times meals are available which include breakfast, lunch and dinner.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Mahatma Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Wardha.

content.Placements: There are many types of job roles like medical officers, senior residents, junior residents, etc. We can join PG courses at this college after completing the UG course. During internships, we work in all departments of the hospital. Internships are also offered in our course, and the stipend is Rs.11,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: Laboratories are good for practical purposes. Every year, all sports activities are conducted by sports authorities. Our campus has air conditioners, a gym, a basketball court, a volleyball court, a badminton court, and a cricket ground. The hostel facilities are very good, and it provides a single room for every student. The hostel also provides solar water heaters and washing machines. Free Wi-Fi is available, and the speed is very high.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a good and strict college.

content.Placements: Placements in this college are above 90%. Everyone had a compulsory internship period of 1 year. The salary offered varies but is always above Rs.40000 per month. The internship package is Rs.8000 per month. Roles offered in our course in three camps such as orientation camp, social service camp and ROME camp.
content.Infrastructure: The library in our college has Wi-Fi and e-resources. Our college has the best infrastructure among medical colleges. Hostels provides single room per student but are extremely old. Mess food is claimed healthy but tasteless. The canteen food is cheap in price and in quality. Insects and snakes may bother you in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is the best central government medical college in Maharashtra.

content.Placements: As it is an MBBS college, the placement rate is almost 100%. Students can join any private hospital or join any government medical hospital at a primary health centre as a medical officer. Many private hospitals in Wardha offer jobs to MBBS students. The average salary starts from 45,000 to 75,000 per month, depending on the location.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. The hospital is huge and spacious. Wi-Fi facilities are available all over. Medical facilities and medical store are available within the campus. Labs are well-equipped with instruments and specimens. Classrooms are spacious enough for 100 students, and the library is one of the best among all medical colleges. Canteen food is okay with average quality food.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: MGIMS is the one among colleges in India, which provides good medical education.

content.Placements: MGIMS is a medical college, so placements are almost 100%, and if anyone wants to work after graduation can join in any government or private hospitals. However, those who want to pursue post-graduation course usually take a year to prepare for the same. Salary depends on the working state, but usually, it ranges from Rs. 45,000-1,00,000 for students with MBBS degree and it is higher for those who have completed post-graduation.
content.Infrastructure: Common classrooms and individual seminar hall in each department, Wi-Fi facilities around the campus, a common library and a common reading room, separate gymnasium for boys and girls, adequate sports facilities are available on the campus. Since it is a medical college, so medical facilities are provided in the best possible manner for students.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Patna Medical College And Hospital offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as MBBS and UG Diploma. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MD, MS and PG Diploma. Patna Medical College And Hospital courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Patna Medical College And Hospital courses stands around INR 42,750 to 69,600.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: All about Patna Medical College and Hospital.

review_content.Placements: There are a total of 200 students in each batch. After completing the 4th year, all Medicos have to do an internship in the college. The internship lasts for 1 year, and you will be paid about 20,000 rupees per month. All students in each batch must do the internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college is not so good right now, but the renovation is ongoing. The government has also stated that this college will become the largest medical hospital in Asia and the second-largest hospital in the world. A library is provided inside the campus, but first-year students are not allowed in it. All the necessary books for MBBS study are available in the library, and it is equipped with AC. New hostels are being built, but first-year students do not get a hostel. They get one when promoted to the second year or beyond.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: A great place to learn and gain confidence for the outside world.

review_content.Placements: The course has a 1-year compulsory internship included in the course itself. The stipend in our state is 20000 per month. Everyone who passes the final year is eligible for the internship. Students give NEET PG to get their specialisation branch. Some also join medical offices to gain experience or to take a break to prepare for their NEET PG.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is undergoing a whole construction and upgrade. The new hospital building is world class but the hostels and other departments are undergoing construction. The construction work has made our college a little mess. The new boys hostel is top-notch. The girls hostel would be ready by the NEST year with all new facilities.

review_summary.college_name: Patna Medical College And Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Must recommend, it's going to be Asia's 2nd the largest medical college with good infrastructure.

content.Placements: After completing MBBS almost everyone gets jobs, mostly open their own clinic. Some work under corporate, and some also do government jobs, so we don't have to worry about getting a job. We will manage to get it easily. Everyone after completing MBBS, opt for PG courses however.
content.Infrastructure: College is under construction, so we have to manage a little bit. However we have a central library which open 24X7, with all facilities. About hostel, I would say a new hostel building has been constructed with all modern facilities. We have a badminton court. However, the college ground has been taken over by a construction company.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Patna Medical College And Hospital.

content.Placements: Our college has a strength of 200 MBBS seats per year. With a 4.5 year, of course, we have a compulsory internship of 1 year with a stipend of 20,000 per month in different departments. In medical as such, no company visits your college, as in engineering, you have to compete for PG seat through NEET PG. But with a glorious history of 100 years, our college have a great alumni network all over world.
content.Infrastructure: As our college is 100 years old, it has some old buildings, but under a new development scheme, new buildings are under construction with world-class facilities to be completed by 2027. And after that, Patna will be the world's second-largest hospital with approximately 5300 beds. Our college has an AC library, a common room for Indore games, outdoor games like tennis court and all, a canteen, and being situated on the bank of the Ganga, a mesmerizing view to have in all weather.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: All about Patna Medical College and Hospital.

content.Placements: There are a total of 200 students in each batch. After completing the 4th year, all Medicos have to do an internship in the college. The internship lasts for 1 year, and you will be paid about 20,000 rupees per month. All students in each batch must do the internship.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college is not so good right now, but the renovation is ongoing. The government has also stated that this college will become the largest medical hospital in Asia and the second-largest hospital in the world. A library is provided inside the campus, but first-year students are not allowed in it. All the necessary books for MBBS study are available in the library, and it is equipped with AC. New hostels are being built, but first-year students do not get a hostel. They get one when promoted to the second year or beyond.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A great place to learn and gain confidence for the outside world.

content.Placements: The course has a 1-year compulsory internship included in the course itself. The stipend in our state is 20000 per month. Everyone who passes the final year is eligible for the internship. Students give NEET PG to get their specialisation branch. Some also join medical offices to gain experience or to take a break to prepare for their NEET PG.
content.Infrastructure: The college is undergoing a whole construction and upgrade. The new hospital building is world class but the hostels and other departments are undergoing construction. The construction work has made our college a little mess. The new boys hostel is top-notch. The girls hostel would be ready by the NEST year with all new facilities.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of top faculty, good placements, good infrastructure, and facilities.

content.Placements: After MBBS, it is almost 100% placement in PHC or SHC level but most people prefer further post-graduation and specialisation after it. The lowest salary package offered is 4 LPA, the highest salary package offered is 8 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 6 LPA. Government hospitals hire mainly MBBS graduates. Corporate hospitals need post-graduation and specialisation. A doctor is a role offered after MBBS.
content.Infrastructure: Top-quality classrooms, labs, library, and Wi-Fi are available in our college. Top-quality hostel, mess, food, and medical facilities from basic to emergency needs are also available on campus. There is a nice ground to play cricket, football, etc. The seniors are very interactive and the warden is cooperative. Facilities like water, bathrooms, toilets, etc., are nice.

Is having all types of labs.

My college is also having canteen and medical facilities. 
Food quality is also very nice.

It is a very old college, and it is going to complete 100 years in 2025. It has a very old college, hospital and some hostel buildings. Mess and quality of food are excellent, and...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Patna Medical College And Hospital.
reviews.review_text: Benches are a bit old and blackboard and classroom design are also old fashioned, but it is comfortable and good. The hostel facility is good and the mess is awesome. Labs are good with all chemicals. The dead body and much biological equipment is available in the laboratory for practical studies. The library is very good with books by famous editors and authors. Hostel food, canteen, sports and games, and everything is available with good quality instruments.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college, facilities and faculty members. Placements are excellent.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college are excellent. Classroom, labs and library are well cleaned. Wi-Fi is available with full speed for students who created their ID. Some buildings got rear and damaged, but it has gradually manufactured. Food served in the mess and canteen is pure hygienic and delicious. Hostel facilities are excellent. Students play many games like cricket, basketball and volleyball.

Smt. Kishoritai Bhoyar College of Pharmacy flagship programmes are BPharm and MPharm. At SVCOP Kamptee, the BPharm programme is a four-year full-time course. The MPharm programme is offered for a duration of 2 years under several specialisations such as: Pharmaceutical Chemistry, Pharmaceutics, Pharmacology, Quality Assurance, Pharmaceutical Regulatory Affairs, and Industrial Pharmacy.
Smt. Kishoritai Bhoyar College of Pharmacy provides international quality education to students. Overall, Smt. Kishoritai Bhoyar College of Pharmacy is one of the best colleges offering quality education to students. After completing their education at Smt. Kishoritai Bhoyar College of Pharmacy students can become pharmacists, drug inspectors, food inspectors, medical underwriters, or even open a drugstore, and others. Top recruiters at SKBCOP for BPharm and MPharm students include Cipla Limited, Lupin, Alembic Pharmaceuticals, Pfizer, Wockhardt Ltd, etc. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Smt. faqs.answer: No, After completing LLB you become a lawyer, however, you are still not an advocate and hence cannot practice law. To become an advocate and to practice law as a profession, you mandatorily need to clear the All India Bar Examination (AIBE). After qualifying AIBE, one can practice law as a full fledged profession.
faqs.question: Q: Can I become a lawyer after completing my LLB?

faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree. You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.
faqs.question: Q: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?

answer.text: No, After completing LLB you become a lawyer, however, you are still not an advocate and hence cannot practice law. To become an advocate and to practice law as a profession, you mandatorily need to clear the All India Bar Examination (AIBE). After qualifying AIBE, one can practice law as a full fledged profession.

faqs.question: Can I become a lawyer after completing my LLB?

answer.text: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree. You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
