review_summary.college_name: Smt. Kishoritai Bhoyar College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharm. in Pharmaceutical Chemistry - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for pharmacy students.

content.Placements: Research and development, QA department, RA department, and various product departments are placements available at our college. Many students have secured placements this year. BDR Company and Lupin connected with the campus, which is beneficial for all students. The placement cell of our college engages with many top recruitment companies such as Sun, Cipla, IPCA, and Lupin, offering high packages for students. Some students have landed jobs in research, marketing, sales, or production. Many students were placed in 2022.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good for students, with many excellent facilities. Many students live in the hostel, and the mess is also great. The courses are well-structured and provide a wealth of knowledge. The college hostels are quite spacious, with separate facilities for boys and girls. The hospitality offered by the college is commendable.

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharm. in Pharmaceutical Chemistry - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a great educational campus in the Vidarbha region and has a good placement for students.

content.Placements: 90 percent of students were placed in your course. The highest package is 3 to 4 LPA while the lowest package is 1.8 to 2.5 LPA. Companies such as BDR Pharmaceutical International Pvt Ltd Endopar Formulation Russan Pharma Advancement and Hetero Pharmaceutical reported that 90 percent of students secured internships at various pharmaceutical companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is commendable and inspiring for students. Various activities such as NSS sports and annual celebrations were enjoyed with great joy and enthusiasm. The college provides the best educational environment in the Vidarbha region, ensuring students have the infrastructure needed for a bright future.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Education is excellent, but placements need to be improved.

content.Placements: Typically, B.Pharm students do not opt for placements as they pursue higher education. The average placement rate for M.Pharm is between 15% and 25%, with an average package of 2.5-3 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Lupin, Macleods, BDA Pharma, and Endo. The lowest package offered is 1.5 LPA, and the highest is 2.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: College has a good infrastructure, including a well-established library and laboratories with good equipment and apparatus. The classrooms are air-conditioned. The college also provides bus and hostel facilities, including a mess. Additionally, sports facilities are available.

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharm. in Pharmaceutics - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is an educational campus in the Vidarbha region and has a good placement record for students.

content.Placements: One of the best colleges of pharmacy in India, it offers quality education and personal guidance to each and every student. The college has an official tie-up with Lupin Pharmaceuticals. They also provide paid internships. Other top recruiting companies are BDR Pharmaceuticals, Endo Par Formulations, Macleods Pharmaceuticals, and Russian Pharma. Almost 90% of students got internships in reputed companies. The highest package offered is 3 LPA, the lowest is 1.8-2.8 LPA, and the average is 1-2 LPA. The roles offered in my course are QA, QC, R&D, and A&D.

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharm. in Quality Assurance - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good placements and assistance.

content.Placements: The T&P cell is proactive and works hard to ensure students are well-prepared through skill development, mock interviews, and regular industry interaction. Reputed companies visit the campus every year. Many of my batchmates, including me, secured placements in good organizations. I have been placed in BDR Pharmaceuticals, Vadodara, through campus, and the college has always supported its students.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is good, including the classrooms and library. The library is also well-equipped with so many books. The college also has a hostel facility within its campus. The hostel is also nice and provides good food. It makes us feel homely.

paragraphs: Smt. Kishoritai Bhoyar College of Pharmacy admissionsare a mix of entrance and merit-based. Candidates can register themselves in an online mode for admissions. Check the admission process below:
1: Smt. Kishoritai Bhoyar College of Pharmacy Application Process 2025

The application mode is online. For admission to the various programmes, aspirants need to apply at the official website, https://enrollonline.co.in/Registration/Apply/SKB. Candidates have to fill up all the details carefully, such as name, mobile number, name of the state, etc. Candidates can fill out the application form on the institute's official website.
2: Selection
The institute considers various entrance exam scores, such as MHT-CET, GPAT, for admission to the BTech, MTech courses. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The institute also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theSmt. Kishoritai Bhoyar College of Pharmacy feesto confirm their seats at the institute.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for pharmacy students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good for students, with many excellent facilities. Many students live in the hostel, and the mess is also great. The courses are well-structured and provide a wealth of knowledge. The college hostels are quite spacious, with separate facilities for boys and girls. The hospitality offered by the college is commendable.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great educational campus in the Vidarbha region and has a good placement for students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is commendable and inspiring for students. Various activities such as NSS sports and annual celebrations were enjoyed with great joy and enthusiasm. The college provides the best educational environment in the Vidarbha region, ensuring students have the infrastructure needed for a bright future.

reviews.review_heading: Education is excellent, but placements need to be improved.
reviews.review_text: College has a good infrastructure, including a well-established library and laboratories with good equipment and apparatus. The classrooms are air-conditioned. The college also provides bus and hostel facilities, including a mess. Additionally, sports facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: It is an educational campus in the Vidarbha region and has a good placement record for students.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is excellent and inspiring for the students, featuring good library facilities and well-equipped labs. The campus is provided with Wi-Fi facilities. The hostels are very good. There are separate hostels for girls and boys with high security in both.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and assistance.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is good, including the classrooms and library. The library is also well-equipped with so many books. The college also has a hostel facility within its campus. The hostel is also nice and provides good food. It makes us feel homely.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and curriculum are good but dissatisfied with the rules and regulations.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good but the hostels are built without plans and are very organized. Hostel rooms do have proper ventilation. The hostel mess is managed very professionally and hygienic. Toilets are sufficient for the number of students living there.

reviews.review_heading: Best place to grow and learn.
reviews.review_text: College has AC classrooms and an auditorium. Very good laboratories with sophisticated instruments are available. Students are allowed to visit various industries. There's a digital library with more than 25,000 books, and the entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The college has a canteen titled Skb Dhaba with quality food and mess offers veg and non-veg food.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the college's placement and campus.
reviews.review_text: Our college offers tasty canteen food, along with Wi-Fi and TV access. Discipline is upheld at all times. Breakfast, including milk and tea, is served daily. Both vegetarian and non-vegetarian options are available in the hostel canteen and mess. Furthermore, medical facilities, like a college ambulance, are readily accessible to students.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with all the facilities in the college.
reviews.review_text: College has good facilities and infrastructure available.  Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, classrooms, and library facilities are all available. Hostel and canteen facilities are also provided. Students are regularly engaged in various sports activities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfactory, the college provides an excellent environment for study.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a huge library with a computer lab and with Wi-Fi facility. The college owns a college hostel having a good environment and food. And there is the college canteen with a variety of food, and also having the medical facility by providing the college ambulance.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the facilities, infrastructure, and good quality education.
reviews.review_text: College facilities and infrastructure are well-equipped. The labs are well-equipped with all the necessary equipment and chemicals necessary for the research work. Along with that, Wi-Fi facilities are provided in our labs and library. The hostel facility and the quality of food are good.

reviews.review_heading: Quality education and experienced staff, student-friendly environment.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is well-equipped and also provides ramps. The college also provides Wi-Fi facilities. The laboratories are well-equipped with good sophisticated instruments. The food quality is great and hygienic. The students are encouraged to participate in sports and regular extracurricular activities are carried out.

reviews.review_heading: I really enjoy the campus, got best teachers, staff, and management.
reviews.review_text: Talking about infrastructure is best with all availability of Wi-Fi, digital classrooms, library with all the books for the course. In canteen, different varieties of food every day, hygiene along with affordable food prices. I have done lunch in a mess 3 to 4 times, and I like the taste and varieties too.

reviews.review_heading: Placements well possible at this college.
reviews.review_text: In this course, there are a number of labs and equipment are there for the selected course. Also, there number digital classrooms are there. Wi-Fi is also there for post-graduate students in their specified lab. Coming to hostel, there are available in basic requirements for students and also the priority on safety.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Excellent food in hostel. We also have a reading room in hostel for studies. Every festival is celebrated in hostel. Warden is also available 24 hours to take care of the hostelite. Ambulance facility is also there to take sick people to hospitals. Overall, best hostel.

reviews_list.review_title: Faculty is excellent but no extracurricular activities is a drawback.

review_content.Placements: All of our seniors who got passed out this year were placed in some or the other companies after their internship. Only a few students cracked the NEET PG exam. Most students were placed into hospitals after their internship. The package is 95,000/- per month which is very reasonable for freshers.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels are okay for students with an accommodation for two students. For 1st and 2nd year students, two students share a room but after second year students get a single room. The hostel fee is reasonable that it is just 1800/- (eighteen hundred rupees only) with 10,000 security deposit which will be given back to you when you leave the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: ESIC- A plethora of knowledge and creativity.

review_content.Placements: After MBBS you have to attend the internship period, one doesn't have to worry much about internships. Almost all the students got to work for the super specialty and various other departments of our college. The stipend is usually15k-20k, best among other state-based MBBS colleges.
review_content.Infrastructure: About hostels: For girls:- We've a well furnished 2 bhk flats given for 4 people. A store, kitchen, hall is there along with 2 washrooms. For boys:- They have 2 people in a considerably big room. They share common washrooms. There is another boys hostel which is being renovated. About college: we've a 250 seater lecture hall-cum-auditorium. Additionally, each department has a 50 seater, 120 seater, departmental library and a reading room. We've a central library connected with a reading room. Entire campus is well air conditioned. Each department has its own museum and labs connected to it.

review_content.Placements: Since this is a medical college, right after 4 years of your MBBS course, you have to do a 1-year internship at your college only, and during this time you also get a stipend. After the completion, you can either serve a bond of 1 year as a doctor in the college or pay 5 lacks and break the bond.

description: ESIC Medical College Hyderabad cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

ESIC Medical College Hyderabad NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 6515 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

ESIC Medical College Hyderabad MBBS cutoff 2025 was 6515 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 9301 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

ESIC Medical College Hyderabad accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 25203 to 47704. According to this range, the most and least competitive courses are MS and MD, respectively. For more details, see the table below.

According to the ESIC Medical College Hyderabad MS cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisation for the General AI category was MS in Otorhinolaryngology. The round 4 closing rank for this specialisation was 25203.

college_info.intro:
Bundelkhand University provides a wide range of courses across streams such as Arts, Science, Computer Applications, Medical, Engineering, Law, Mass Communication, and Management at the UG, PG, and Doctoral levels. The popular programmes at BU Uttar Pradesh are BTech, BSc, and MBA, among others. BU Jhansi offers more than 110 courses.
BU Jhansi offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The university offers BTech programme across various specialisations like ECE, CSE, Mechanical, Biotechnology, Biomedical, Food Engineering & Technology, and others. Bundelkhand University MBA programme is a two-year programme. The university offers MBA course in International Business, Tourism Management, Financial, Banking & Insurance, Business Economics, and others.
Below mentioned are the Bundelkhand University popular programmes:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered in the final year only
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Appication (BCA Hons.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: There has been a lot of improvement in the faculty now.

review_content.Placements: It is not good for placements, very few companies participate. I completed B.CA (Hons.) in 2022 when the faculty was not so good, but now it has become much better than before. There were no placements during my time at the university. Last time I heard, someone got a package of 6.5 LPA for the B. Teach course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Talking about infrastructure, it is good. There are more courses, and the hostel is also good. The quality of food was also average at that time, but we can say that it was worth eating and it wasn't that bad.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers at our time were both helpful and knowledgeable. The course is relevant to the curriculum and makes students industry-ready. I can say the semester exams are average. This college is not that big, so it is very difficult to say about average. To pass, you must have a minimum of 23 marks in each subject after deducting practical marks.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It is good for living the best college life.

review_content.Placements: 0.01 % of students get placements from the college campus. No companies visit the college to recruit students from this course only. If we work on our own development, then only we will achieve our dream job. The highest salary offered ranges from Rs. 70,000 to 1.5 lakhs per month. I recommend students do not join this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is good, but there is no development. The hostel is good for boys and not for girls, due to the outer area. Labs are only for seeing and not for gaining information or for developing skills. Only a few digital classrooms are available here.

review_summary.college_name: Bundelkhand University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Great professors and principal.

content.Placements: There are no placements at all. It is a government college so no placements happen. Even in UNIS, as DU I do not think there are placement opportunities for Bachelor degree holders. This much to be expected. You do not join this college to get a job but to get a degree.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is of old times. No new buildings or halls are being built even now. Wi-Fi is sucky at best only works in the library and surrounding areas with the least speed possible. There are no labs as far as I can remember. Classrooms are spacious but thats all.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Hindi - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: In all, I want to say my university is one of the best.

content.Placements: In my course, about 60-70% students got placed, and the package lasts between 5-7 LPA according to person to person. In my course literature, there is a provided job. About 70% got an internship with a variety of companies. In my course, you get the role of poet, story writer, and editor.
content.Infrastructure: At university, you will get all types of facilities free of cost, like free Wi-Fi, labs (all types of labs), in the classroom, there is peaceful environment, and teachers give lectures. Hostel in one room, 2-person share and the bed is average, the water system is so good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Appication (BCA Hons.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: There has been a lot of improvement in the faculty now.

content.Placements: It is not good for placements, very few companies participate. I completed B.CA (Hons.) in 2022 when the faculty was not so good, but now it has become much better than before. There were no placements during my time at the university. Last time I heard, someone got a package of 6.5 LPA for the B. Teach course.
content.Infrastructure: Talking about infrastructure, it is good. There are more courses, and the hostel is also good. The quality of food was also average at that time, but we can say that it was worth eating and it wasn't that bad.
content.Faculty: Teachers at our time were both helpful and knowledgeable. The course is relevant to the curriculum and makes students industry-ready. I can say the semester exams are average. This college is not that big, so it is very difficult to say about average. To pass, you must have a minimum of 23 marks in each subject after deducting practical marks.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is good for living the best college life.

content.Placements: 0.01 % of students get placements from the college campus. No companies visit the college to recruit students from this course only. If we work on our own development, then only we will achieve our dream job. The highest salary offered ranges from Rs. 70,000 to 1.5 lakhs per month. I recommend students do not join this college.
content.Infrastructure: The college is good, but there is no development. The hostel is good for boys and not for girls, due to the outer area. Labs are only for seeing and not for gaining information or for developing skills. Only a few digital classrooms are available here.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The college is like any other old GMC.

content.Placements: Basically, it is MBBS. After the 4.5-year course, we have to do a mandatory internship. The stipend offered is Rs. 12,000 per month. After that, we have to serve a 2-year bond, which gives a salary that ranges from Rs. 80,000-90,000 per month, but I am not so sure about that. Students prepare for NEET PG if they wish to pursue specialisation in a field.
content.Infrastructure: Since the college is old, the infrastructure is not so good compared to the new colleges. Although labs, etc., are fully functional, the lecture theatre does not have AC or Wi-Fi. Projectors mostly don't work. Hostels are in a paramedical campus where the UG girls stay till the 3rd year, which has new and better infrastructure. But there is a frequent problem with water and electricity.

admission_overview.college_name: Bundelkhand University Course Admissions 2026: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Criteria

admission_overview.title: Bundelkhand University Jhansi Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Bundelkhand University admission to various courses through an entrance test and direct admission (through merit) in its campus and affiliated colleges. The university conducts its entrance test, for admission to some UG and PG courses. BU Jhansi has eight faculties that offer UG and PG courses in streams like Science, Law, Commerce, Arts, Medical, Agriculture, Education, Technical & Management. The university has more than 300 colleges affiliated with it. Candidates seeking admission to affiliated colleges have to apply separately on the concerned college's website. Apart from this, the university has 40 institutes of its own. Bundelkhand University admission to any of these institutes is done directly from the university's official website.

eligibility_selection.title: Bundelkhand University Jhansi Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: BU Jhansi admissions are entrance or merit-based. Aspirants can apply for admission to most of the UG and PG courses through university entrance-exam scores. The university also offers direct admission to a few programmes. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas, graduation is required for PG programmes. Below are the top Bundelkhand University courses along with their eligibility and selection:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics/ Biology with at least 50% aggregate
courses_table.selection_criteria: AKTU Entrance Exam/ BU Entrance Exam

courses_table.eligibility: Graduation with at least 45%-50% aggregate
courses_table.selection_criteria: AKTU Entrance Exam/ BU Entrance Exam

courses_table.eligibility: Graduation or PG in any discipline with at least 50% aggregate
Class 12 with at least 40% aggregate
Class 12 with Commerce/ Science with Maths stream with at least 50% aggregate (vocational subject student need not apply)

faqs.answer: Aspirants who have completed Class 12 with Commerce/ Science with Maths stream with at least 50% aggregate (vocational subject student need not apply) can apply for BCom (Hons) at Bundelkhand University Jhansi. Candidates must have documents to prove their admission at the time of verification.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for Bundelkhand University Jhansi BCom (Hons)?

faqs.answer: Aspirants who have passed Class 12 with Physics and Chemistry along with Mathematics or Biology/ Computer Science/ Biotechnology with a minimum of 50% aggregate as per PCI are eligible to apply for BPharm at Bundelkhand University Jhansi.

paragraphs: Bundelkhand University admission process is a multi-step process. Candidates are first required to register for the course of their choice. The university conducts its own test to shortlist candidates for a few courses. Check below step-wise admission process for BU Jhansi:
STEP 1: Bundelkhand University Application Process 2026
Eligible aspirants need to apply online for the course. Candidates can first register and then fill out the application form. Below is the application fee for Bundelkhand University admission:
INR 1,100 for General Category
INR 550 for SC/ ST
INR 700 for General Category
INR 350 (SC/ ST)
STEP 2: Selection

Bundelkhand University selects candidates for UG and PG courses either based on entrance exam or merit in the last qualifying exam. For some of the specialisations, BU Jhansi also conductsBU Entrance Exam.Direct admissionis available based on merit for a few programmes.
STEP 3: Result & Admission Confirmation

Once the BU Entrance Exam results are declared, BU Jhansi releases a merit list announcing the names of the selected candidates. Such applicants have to come for counselling and document verification. Candidates have to pay an additional counselling fee of INR 250. Candidates eligible for direct admission are required to contact on the official e-mail ID of the respective department head to fill the provisional admission process.

Bundelkhand University fee includes multiple components like tuition, caution deposit, etc. As a part of admission process, candidates are required to confirm their seat by paying the programme fee. Below isBU Jhansi feeand average package for popular courses:

description: Bundelkhand University cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech and MD/MS programme for all categories and rounds. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about Bundelkhand University UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other accepted exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The Bundelkhand University cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Bundelkhand University BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 216275 and 1281371 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering. The first rou

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the HS quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 216275 for the general HS quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 224334 in 2023 and 170537 in 2022. On analysing the cutoff data of three years, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering demonstrated fluctuating trend.

Bundelkhand University, Jhansi accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Bundelkhand University can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Bundelkhand University provides admission to PG courses through the CUET PG exam. Based on CUET PG entrance exam scores, the students are called for the university's counselling process for round-wise seat allotments. In 2024, Bundelkhand University cutoff 2024 for the General AI quota stood at 11892 for the MCA course. Similarly, the Last Round cutoff for the same course stood at 7092.

Bundelkhand University also accepts CUET PG scores for PG admission. The cutoff was concluded for the General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, and PWD categories as opening and closing ranks in the AI quota. Considering the last-round cutoff in 2024, the most sought-after specialisation was an MBA in Financial Management for the General AI category students. Other than an MBA, the Master of Computer Applications (MCA) stood at 7177. So, analysing the cutoff data over the past three years, MCA saw a decreasing

Bundelkhand University accepts entrance exam scores, followed by the CUET PG counselling process for admission to the PG programmes. Candidates seeking admission can check out the table below to view the important CUET PG 2025 dates.

The cutoff has been published till Round 2 in the form of opening and closing ranks for the students belonging to the All India category. nirf.description:
Bundelkhand University has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Pharmacy' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'Pharmacy' category, the institute's ranks have ascended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Bundelkhand University climbed 6 ranks to #68 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It has been seen that in the 'State Public University' category, the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Bundelkhand University's rank is #51, the same as last year's rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.

hostel.description:
Open Air Theatre at Girls hostel to provide recreational, interactive and lively environment for the inmates of the hostel.
Two girls hostels, i.e., P.G. Women's Hostel and Jhalkari Bai Girls' hostel with capacity to accommodate 150 and 300 inmates, respectively and Lord Buddha PG boys hostel has accommodation for more than 150 students.
All the existing hostels are equipped with the requisite facilities in terms of security, food, furnishing, telephone, regular power and water supply, provision of hot and cold water during winters and summers with recreation and T.V. Room etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Bundelkhand Degree CollegeReviewed on 8 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Great professors and principal.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is of old times. No new buildings or halls are being built even now. Wi-Fi is sucky at best only works in the library and surrounding areas with the least speed possible. There are no labs as far as I can remember. Classrooms are spacious but thats all.

reviews.review_heading: In all, I want to say my university is one of the best.
reviews.review_text: At university, you will get all types of facilities free of cost, like free Wi-Fi, labs (all types of labs), in the classroom, there is peaceful environment, and teachers give lectures. Hostel in one room, 2-person share and the bed is average, the water system is so good.

reviews.review_heading: There has been a lot of improvement in the faculty now.
reviews.review_text: Talking about infrastructure, it is good. There are more courses, and the hostel is also good. The quality of food was also average at that time, but we can say that it was worth eating and it wasn't that bad.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by SR Group of Institution JhansiReviewed on 30 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is good for living the best college life.
reviews.review_text: The college is good, but there is no development. The hostel is good for boys and not for girls, due to the outer area. Labs are only for seeing and not for gaining information or for developing skills. Only a few digital classrooms are available here.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Maharani Laxmi Bai Medical CollegeReviewed on 30 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is like any other old GMC.
reviews.review_text: Since the college is old, the infrastructure is not so good compared to the new colleges. Although labs, etc., are fully functional, the lecture theatre does not have AC or Wi-Fi. Projectors mostly don't work. Hostels are in a paramedical campus where the UG girls stay till the 3rd year, which has new and better infrastructure. But there is a frequent problem with water and electricity.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by SR Group of Institution JhansiReviewed on 21 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Placements were good in 2019, and the infrastructure is really good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of my building is also very well-structured. Hostel facilities are very helpful for our daily work. The taste of hostel food is delicious, cooked with a focus on hygiene, and they always make sure to clean the room.

reviews.review_heading: It's great for studying if you are from a place with less universities and colleges.
reviews.review_text: The faculty members and infrastructure are not too bad. The Wi-Fi is always available, no matter the time. We have labs in our department and smart classrooms, but the interior is not that great either, as it is not painted properly, and desks and tables in a few classrooms are old. The hostel facility is great as per the cost they charge. You can't compare them with top colleges, but they are better than most hostel facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Choudhary Digvijay Singh MahavidyalayaReviewed on 25 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the value for money, good lecturer, and infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The college is very vast. The ground is very big. It contains a physics lab, chemistry lab, biology lab, several classrooms, etc. It has a cricket ground, volleyball ground, badminton court, and football ground. The canteen food is also worth it. The college provides good medical facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by SR Group of Institution JhansiReviewed on 20 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The fee of the college is very nominal about Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 50,000 for those who get fee waivers.
reviews.review_text: The hostel of the college is not very good. The hostel life is not what everyone expects although I'm from Jhansi itself so I didn't join it but got to know about the hostel life. It's like a nightmare for many students, but they do have some Wi-Fi facilities.

reviews.review_heading: All about my university (Bundelkhand University)
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is awesome and well-maintained. A personal auditorium is there in our institute. There are 5 personal labs, in which 1 is a Cyber lab, 1 is a Ballistic lab, 1 is a Chemistry lab, and the other 2 are common practical labs. All labs are active, and the auditorium is also active for extracurricular activities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sri Guru Harkishan Degree CollegeReviewed on 26 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for commerce students.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good campus, with lush green grounds, but there is no canteen facility. There are occasional sports events, basically like kho-kho. There is no Wi-Fi on the campus, it's only available for the teachers.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is good that's the only reason I don't hate my department.
reviews.review_text: Labs are just fine. Some of the chemicals are expired. Library is okay. No Wi-Fi is provided you need to get your own in hostels. Mess food is just like any other, controversial. I like my department because of my teachers but there is nothing I like about my hostel other than my room.

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied.
reviews.review_text: The university provides hostels for both girls and boys. There are a total 5 hostels for girls Virangna Khali Ari Bai, Samta, Annex, and OBC. Infrastructure is good. The quality of food is not that much of good. Wi-Fi isn't working. Classrooms are okay. Medical facilities are also not that good in hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Campus is okay but the department is average with no placement.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is okay if only you can adjust to their long list of rules and regulations. The girl's hostel mess is so average. In the summer, the problem we face is electricity. The hostel gate closes at 6:50 PM only and if you want to take leave, you'll have to follow a very long and unnecessary procedure.

reviews.review_heading: Nice and decent for any course.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college and my course is good. There are different labs for the practices and computer labs. There is a personal auditorium and the classrooms are very nice and clean. Faculty of the hostel is very polite and gives support to whatever you need.

data.description: The faculty members of Bundelkhand University are very knowledgeable, friendly and extremely qualified. Their teaching methodology involves a case-study approach, presentations, class participation, industrial visit, live projects, simulation, etc.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Bundelkhand University, Jhansi

likes.text: Companies like CM Technology, Cafe Coffee Day, Prakash Infratech Solution, and many small companies visit the college for placements.
I really towards our college and placement cell for supporting and providing us opportunities to learn interview skill and guiding us in placement.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: PSG College of Pharmacy is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.Pharma and D.Pharma. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.Pharma. The fee structure for the PSG College of Pharmacy programmes is around INR 1,27,000 to 1,97,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides the best infrastructure and placements.

review_content.Placements: Around 20% of students get placed every year in top companies with an average salary of Rs. 50,000 per month. Top recruiting companies are Dabur, Himalaya, Cipla, and various other pharmaceutical companies. Top roles offered are in drug analysis, drug formulation, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has three vast grounds for various sports. It has a well-developed indoor sports complex. All classrooms are spacious. Each classroom can accommodate around 100 students. Each classroom has a projector to educate us in advanced methods by showing slides and videos. Our has a huge central library. It provides textual knowledge to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good in all aspects.

review_content.Placements: About 75% of students got placed in good companies. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Sun Pharma, Ranbaxy Laboratories, Alembic Pharmaceuticals, Biocon Ltd, Candela Healthcare Ltd, Vertex Pharma Chemicals, Apex Laboratories, etc. Top roles offered are drug inspector, quality control manager, teacher, entrepreneur, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well-equipped with tables and chairs for every individual student. Every classroom has a projector and screen. Laboratories have all apparatus and chemicals for practicals. We can borrow a lot of books from our library. The hostel provides all facilities. The hostel food is good. Sports are available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college.

content.Infrastructure: The campus is good. All hostels are average. I would suggest staying in a PG. It is not possible to get a single room in every hostel. Sometimes, we face water issues.
content.Faculty: The teaching quality is good. We have to learn things by ourselves. Our teachers share PDFs and slides. They teach the concepts through presentations. All faculty members are quite strict.
content.Other: Our college provides skills that are necessary for our careers. It provides many certificate programs. It guides us through our career path. Our college provides many opportunities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college is helpful for the future.

content.Placements: Around 25% of students get placed in our course. Many students get placement offers in our college. B. pharma course students got placed in many companies.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facility is good and neat. Different variety of food items and snacks are served in our college. It serves both vegetarian and non-vegetarian food items. Medical facilities are available 24 hours. Our college has a library that consists of all types of books for all the courses. Classrooms are good.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are good, well-qualified, and knowledgeable. Teaching quality is good. Semester exams are easy. The maximum pass percentage is 50%. It is helpful for students' future.

individual_reviews.title: This college has average placements.

content.Placements: Less than 10% of students got placed. Even the best-placed students have not yet been called to work. The average salary would be around Rs. 15,000 per month. Not too many companies come for placements. Mostly, production or industry-related companies come with Rs. 10,000 per month to Rs. 15,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: The college has the topmost facilities for studies. There is no Wi-Fi. Labs have the required equipment. Each classroom is provided with a projector to facilitate learning with presentations. The hostel has average facilities, and the mess food is not up to the mark. On campus, a canteen is provided.

paragraphs: PSG College of Pharmacy admissions are based on merit. Some of the courses include D.Pharma, B.Pharma and M.Pharma. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 1,97,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 2 years - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

hostel_campus.college_name: PSG College of Pharmacy Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: The campus is good. All hostels are average. I would suggest staying in a PG. It is not possible to get a single room in every hostel. Sometimes, we face water issues.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is helpful for the future.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility is good and neat. Different variety of food items and snacks are served in our college. It serves both vegetarian and non-vegetarian food items. Medical facilities are available 24 hours. Our college has a library that consists of all types of books for all the courses. Classrooms are good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides the best infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has three vast grounds for various sports. It has a well-developed indoor sports complex. All classrooms are spacious. Each classroom can accommodate around 100 students. Each classroom has a projector to educate us in advanced methods by showing slides and videos. Our has a huge central library. It provides textual knowledge to students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well-equipped with tables and chairs for every individual student. Every classroom has a projector and screen. Laboratories have all apparatus and chemicals for practicals. We can borrow a lot of books from our library. The hostel provides all facilities. The hostel food is good. Sports are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: This college has average placements.
reviews.review_text: The college has the topmost facilities for studies. There is no Wi-Fi. Labs have the required equipment. Each classroom is provided with a projector to facilitate learning with presentations. The hostel has average facilities, and the mess food is not up to the mark. On campus, a canteen is provided.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus, infrastructure, atmosphere but not a good management or administration.
reviews.review_text: A very good infrastructure With good laboratory and absolutely free Library but there is no Wi-Fi in this campus. Individual rooms in hostel, Good food but it gets bored in the period of four years of stay. Good canteen and Good campus for sports activities.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at Amity University Lucknow are BTech and MBA. The university offers these programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. These courses are offered to students for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively with a comprehensive curriculum. Amity University Lucknow courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry.
The university offers courses in full-time mode and across several specialisations such as Computer Science and Engineering, Biotechnology, Artificial Intelligence, and Aerospace Engineering. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Amity LKO in the table provided below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
Amity University Lucknow offers various programmes to students at UG, PG, and PhD levels. The university offers courses in streams like Engineering, Animation, Computer Science, Biotechnology, Pharmacy, Fine Arts, etc. At the UG level, the university offers courses like BSc, LLB, BCom, BA, BBA, etc. for a duration of 3 years.

At the PG level, the university offers MBA, MA, MSc, MTech, MCom, MFA, and other programmes. They can also enroll in programmes and other courses at the Amity University campus in Lucknow. There are BTech specialisations available, including IT, Mechanical, Aerospace, Artificial Intelligence, and Civil Engineering. Merit and entrance exam results determine admission to different courses. A list of , their prerequisites, and the total cost of tuition are displayed in the table below:

faqs.answer: A:    A pass in Class 12 with at least 55% aggregate is required to apply for BBA specialisations. The minimum aggregate is not specified by the university for BBA Tourism Management. Candidates passing Class 12 with at least 80% aggregate are eligible for direct admission to BBA course. Additionally, admission to BBA is based on merit in the last qualifying exam or CUET UG score. As soon as the selection rounds are over, candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university. The total tuition fee for BBA is ranges between INR 8.58 Lacs and INR 12.36 Lacs as per an unofficial source. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled.
faqs.question: Who is eligible for BBA at Amity University Lucknow?

faqs.answer: A:    INR 10.4 lakh - INR 13.8 lakh is the total tuition fee range at Amity Lucknow for  MBA course. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. Admission to MBA course is based on national-level entrance exam CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, etc. The university also conducts AMCAT for providing admission to MBA course. Additionally, candidates need to qualify English test for admission to MBA International. The shortlisted candidates are further called for a personal interview round. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. The application fee is waived off for admission at Amity Lucknow.

reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the college is great. You can study and develop connections.

review_content.Placements: Around 50% students were placed, the highest package is 4.5 LPA, and it is in Quality Assurance. The top recruiting companies are Cipla, Alkem Laboratories, Pfizer, etc. Overall, the placement is average, but the placement cell tries its best to get every student placed in a good company with a good package.
review_content.Infrastructure: The Amity University Lucknow campus has impressive infrastructure that creates a perfect environment for learning and growing, the university provides both indoor and outdoor sports facilities. The playgrounds are well maintained, and the classrooms are great.

reviews_list.batch_info: LL.M in Criminal Law - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is okay for a master's degree with no good placements. We get a good experience.

review_content.Placements: Self-placements are a better option here since few recruiters visit the college in this branch for placements, so we can head to Noida. It is a branch for better recruiters. Here we can get a good LL.M degree of value in no time, and with ease we can score well. All these help in future career prospects.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good, and it was recently renovated. The college has good classrooms and an AC campus. The only issue is drinking water, and the rest is nice. Around the campus, we can get access to anything, so it is a highlight. A brilliant central library is a key structure with a clock tower above it.

overview_faqs.question: What is fees of Amity Lucknow BTech course?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Amity Lucknow BTech ranges between INR 8.3 lakh - INR 15.4 lakh as per official sources. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. Admission to BTech course is based on national or state-level Engineering entrance exam or AMCAT score. The university also accepts CUET UG or JEE Main score for admission to all BTech specialisations, except 3 Continent and CSE International. For International specialisation, Amity conducts an English test followed by a PI round. The university also accepts NEET score for BTech Biotechnology. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. The application fee is waived off for admission at Amity Lucknow.

overview_faqs.question: What should I do If I fail to deposit Amity Lucknow fee on time?
overview_faqs.answer: In case a student fails to pay the Amity University Lucknow fee within the specified time, he or she need to approach the admission office via 'Post/ track your query' link available on the admission microsite. The admission committee of the university considers request for extension of date depending on the availability of the seats.

overview_faqs.question: What are the fee payment modes at Amity University, Lucknow?
overview_faqs.answer: Students can pay the semester, application or any other fee at Amity University Lucknow using the below methods:Pay at Amity University Campus via Pay Order/ Demand Draft.Through Bharat Bill PaymentEasy Monthly Instalments via third party companies, independent of AmityThrough PaytmThrough NEFT / RTGS (NO IMPS) in Bank.Through Demand Draft/ Pay-order/ Cash at Axis Bank BranchesThrough Net banking/Credit Card/Debit Card

overview_faqs.question: Does Amity University, Lucknow refund hostel fee?
overview_faqs.answer: Amity University Lucknow hostel fee once paid will not be refunded in case of withdrawal at any point of time. The university refunds security deposit after adjustment/ clearance of dues, if any like the following:Alumni Life Member Fee INR 1,000 (Compulsory)IT Damage ChargesExamination DuesID Card Charges INR 500 (If not returned)Any other dues (Gate pass Charges/Duplicate ID Card etc.)Admin Damage ChargesCentral Library ChargesAcademics (Lab, Department Library/book bank, CRC, etc.)

review_summary.college_name: Amity University Lucknow Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I have pursued B.Com (Hons) from Amity University Lucknow; great campus, best college life.

content.Placements: The percent of students placed in this course is 90%. The highest package for this course was 4,50,000, and the lowest was 2,00,000. The top recruiting companies include Amazon, HCL, etc. 100% of students get internships from the course in HCL. Mostly, data analyst roles are available.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for the B.Com course include a library, classrooms, and Wi-Fi. The hostel quality was quite good, but it could be more well-structured, and the quality of food available in the mess was great in taste. Every weekend they have something special. Other than this, a canteen, medical store, and sports facilities were also available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: BBA at Amity University, Lucknow: The best time of my life.

content.Placements: After BBA, placements are not that high that year. Around 35% of students got placed. The highest package for a graduation is 7.9 LPA. Companies like HDFC Bank, RBL Bank, and Mahindra Finance come to the campus. Sales executive roles are offered by recruiters. Also, the internship percentage is very high.
content.Infrastructure: At Amity University, you will always get top-class infrastructure available. Libraries, classes, labs, and even the corridors are so neat and clean, you always feel like being in the best college. The food in the mess is also served fresh and tasty. For every medical emergency, there is a van always available, and first aid is easily available. Every sport is played, like table tennis, lawn tennis, football, cricket, volleyball, basketball, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is great. You can study and develop connections.

content.Placements: Around 50% students were placed, the highest package is 4.5 LPA, and it is in Quality Assurance. The top recruiting companies are Cipla, Alkem Laboratories, Pfizer, etc. Overall, the placement is average, but the placement cell tries its best to get every student placed in a good company with a good package.
content.Infrastructure: The Amity University Lucknow campus has impressive infrastructure that creates a perfect environment for learning and growing, the university provides both indoor and outdoor sports facilities. The playgrounds are well maintained, and the classrooms are great.

individual_reviews.course: LL.M in Criminal Law - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is okay for a master's degree with no good placements. We get a good experience.

content.Placements: Self-placements are a better option here since few recruiters visit the college in this branch for placements, so we can head to Noida. It is a branch for better recruiters. Here we can get a good LL.M degree of value in no time, and with ease we can score well. All these help in future career prospects.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good, and it was recently renovated. The college has good classrooms and an AC campus. The only issue is drinking water, and the rest is nice. Around the campus, we can get access to anything, so it is a highlight. A brilliant central library is a key structure with a clock tower above it.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Counselling Psychology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Honest review of my college.

content.Placements: Since I had to study further, as well as most of my batchmates wanted the same. Placement is not a factor in the course. Even though there are provisions for placement in many publishing houses and companies in post is content/creative writers with CTC around 2 LPA. As far as internships, we have a summer project, where we have to submit a detailed research paper. This paper is a subject as in whole and is taken very seriously. Weekly reports have to be represented on the progress, and each individual is assigned a mentor. There is no stipend.
content.Infrastructure: College can not provide a hostel I live in civil line Jabalpur. There are many hostels and the charge is Rs 4,000 approximately. Hostel condition is very good. The students live in a hostel and they enjoy their life.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in Amity University Lucknow without CUET?

Apart from these, admission to other courses is mostly based on merit in the last qualifying exam.

placement_data.title: Amity University Lucknow Placement Overview 2026
paragraphs: The Amity University Lucknow placement report 2026 has not been out as of yet. While the Amity University placement for school of Engineering has been out. The highest package offered was INR 35.9 LPA . The average package offered was INR 9.6 LPA . The median package offered was INR 6 LPA . Three companies offered international offers to the students. The top recruiters that participated during the placement drive 2025 were Amazon, Google, IBM and many more.

During the Amity Lucknow placement drive 2025, top companies such as EY, Deloitte, Pepsi, Google, Facebook among others participated. The placement cell conducts skill building workshops and pre placement mock series. The cell also keep close corporations with leading companies.

faqs.question: What is the job scope after MCA from Amity University Lucknow?
faqs.answer: There is no scarcity of lucrative job opportunities for MCA graduates. A candidate with a master’s degree in computer applications along with the right amount of relevant work experience, skill set and caliber can easily find great job opportunities at leading IT firms across India and abroad. The salary offered to various job profiles depends on the entry-level as well the experience and skills of the professionals. Those who have minimum experience of 3-5 years can expect to earn in the range of INR 6-12 LPA in top companies. faqs.question: What is the average package offered at the Amity University Lucknow?
faqs.answer: The average package offered during the 2024 placement drive is yet to be released on the official website. However, as per the recent students’ reviews on Shiksha page, the average package offered during the recent Amity University Lucknow placement stood at INR 8 LPA. The same is tabulated below: Particulars Placement Statistics Average package INR 8 LPA Note : The average package mentioned above has been taken from students’ reviews on the Shiksha page.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of the Amity University Lucknow?
faqs.answer: As per the official website, various recruiters visited every year at Amity University Lucknow placed students in new-age job roles. The top recruiters of who participated during the recent Amity Lucknow placements included Samsung, Wipro, JP Morgan, Nestle, Infosys, Accenture , etc.

faqs.question: What is the cost of studying MBA from Amity University Lucknow?
faqs.answer: Amity University Lucknow offers a MBA course to students at the PG level. It is offered in full-time mode for 2 years. The total tuition fee of MBA at Amity Lucknow ranges between INR 10.4 Lacs and INR 13.8 lakh.

faqs.question: What is the fees of BBA in Amity University Lucknow?
faqs.answer: INR 4 lakh and INR 13.7 lakh is the total tuition fee range for BBA as per official sources. The fee varies as per the specialisation. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. Admission to BBA courses is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The university also accepts CUET UG score for providing admission to BBA course. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. The application fee is waived off for admission at Amity Lucknow.

outlook.description:
Amity University Lucknow has received strong ranks by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'BBA' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the Outlook-ICARE 2024. Amity University Lucknow's rankings in 'BBA' category have shown stability in trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2024, Amity University Lucknow's rank is #109, the same as last year's rank in the 'BBA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It has been observed that the institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'BCA' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2024, Amity University Lucknow's rank is #30, the same as last year's rank in the 'BCA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

reviews.review_heading: I have pursued B.Com (Hons) from Amity University Lucknow; great campus, best college life.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for the B.Com course include a library, classrooms, and Wi-Fi. The hostel quality was quite good, but it could be more well-structured, and the quality of food available in the mess was great in taste. Every weekend they have something special. Other than this, a canteen, medical store, and sports facilities were also available.

reviews.review_heading: BBA at Amity University, Lucknow: The best time of my life.
reviews.review_text: At Amity University, you will always get top-class infrastructure available. Libraries, classes, labs, and even the corridors are so neat and clean, you always feel like being in the best college. The food in the mess is also served fresh and tasty. For every medical emergency, there is a van always available, and first aid is easily available. Every sport is played, like table tennis, lawn tennis, football, cricket, volleyball, basketball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is great. You can study and develop connections.
reviews.review_text: The Amity University Lucknow campus has impressive infrastructure that creates a perfect environment for learning and growing, the university provides both indoor and outdoor sports facilities. The playgrounds are well maintained, and the classrooms are great.

reviews.review_heading: It is okay for a master's degree with no good placements. We get a good experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good, and it was recently renovated. The college has good classrooms and an AC campus. The only issue is drinking water, and the rest is nice. Around the campus, we can get access to anything, so it is a highlight. A brilliant central library is a key structure with a clock tower above it.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: College can not provide a hostel I live in civil line Jabalpur. There are many hostels and the charge is Rs 4,000 approximately. Hostel condition is very good. The students live in a hostel and they enjoy their life.

reviews.review_heading: We have a heavy workload, and too much emphasis on attendance, but good networking and internships.
reviews.review_text: The department is overall nice. The infrastructure and campus are quite good but need more maintenance. The library is an amazing place to be in, canteen and food services are okay. Overall it is good, still needs to improve a lot. There is ample ground space and opportunities to engage in sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is great.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and security are great. The hostel facility is good. The food is not that great. The campus has great Wi-Fi facilities all over the campus. The library is so beautiful with all the course books and extracurricular books as well. The quality of food in the mess is not at all good. Canteen food is better than mess food.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it provides the best and most reliable packages.
reviews.review_text: Libraries and hostel rooms are fantastic and clean. The service that is provided in the library and classrooms is very impressive, but sometimes Wi-Fi stops working, which is a manageable point. Medical facilities are also provided there for some small health issues. Ground is very big, so students can enjoy their recess and free time.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review about my college.
reviews.review_text: In the hostel, bedsheet pillow and pillow cover were provided and table was provided. Meal quality was not so good but breakfast was really very good. We could complete the registration from the official website of Amity University Lucknow.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Amity University, Lucknow campus.
reviews.review_text: We have here Wi-Fi connections, computer labs, classrooms, and library. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is very good with good cleanliness, supportive wardens and staff. Rooms are also quite good and if we look for medical facilities here we have an infirmary in our hostel which has well-specialized doctors. And if we talk about sports and games here is very nice as we have a big backyard ground where we have basketball court, badminton court, cricket ground, and many indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Amity University in Lucknow For M.Sc.  MB Course admission in 25-26.
reviews.review_text: This course's infrastructure quality is very good and uses high-quality materials and products. The college has classrooms, bathrooms, a library, a canteen, a hostel, etc. The canteen facilities are also good and there are many varieties of food available.

reviews.review_heading: Amity University in Uttar Pradesh, course and admission.
reviews.review_text: In this college, library facilities are available and there are all subject books present in the cell. Department classroom is very clean and the bathroom also. In this college, sports committee is organizing sports and games facilities but it is not free. There are charges and rise pool facilities available.

reviews.review_heading: My personal experience in Amity University Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is really good and furnished with all the facilities provided on the campus itself. Talking about the library, it is the best place on the whole campus to sit and study with the best decor. Here, the vibes are really impressive. Wi-Fi for the whole time is provided and we also have water coolers, a canteen, the best sitting areas, and fully air-conditioned corridors and classes too.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure structure is well maintained. The campus is very beautiful. Wi-Fi also works nicely. Classrooms are now maintained. The library is also very good. Books are available over there but the laboratories are not so okay because the AC doesn't work. Instruments and most chemicals are not available. Hostels are not at all good they are just overpriced and the mess food is not good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure with an amazing youth fest and campus life.
reviews.review_text: Labs are well equipped with the proper chemicals available. Classrooms have good Wi-Fi coverage. The best part is the library. We have a lot of books to read and it was built beautifully. The hostels are good and have a well-equipped gym and sports room on the campus.

data.description: Amity University Lucknow has an Anti-Ragging Cell. Hence, the freshers will never meet with this problem while studying in this college. The college premises has strict laws against the student found guilty of any act such as abusing, assaulting, threatening, teasing and embarrassment to new students, among others.

They are very successful in offering placements for students in good companies and improving their skills for the job.

paragraphs: INR 10.4 lakh - INR 13.8 lakh is the total tuition fee range at Amity Lucknow for  MBA course. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. Admission to MBA course is based on national-level entrance exam CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, etc. The university also conducts AMCAT for providing admission to MBA course. Additionally, candidates need to qualify English test for admission to MBA International. The shortlisted candidates are further called for a personal interview round. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. The application fee is waived off for admission at Amity Lucknow.

faqs.answer: A:    The Uttar Pradesh University of Medical Sciences' requirements for MBBS eligibility.The candidate must have received at least a 50% in English, Physics, Chemistry, and Biology on the 10+2 exam or any other exam that is comparable. Candidates for the SC, ST, and OB categories must receive 40% in each of the subjects from their 10+2 exams or any other exams that are comparable, and students with physical disabilities in the general category must receive at least 45% in the aforementioned subjects.Since 85% of the seats are filled by UP MBBS admissions, the candidate must be an Uttar Pradesh resident or have qualified for the state's 10+2 exams.The applicant needs to have registered for the counselling sessions and taken the NEET entrance exam.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBBS at Uttar Pradesh University of Medical Sciences?

faqs.answer: A:    In Uttar Pradesh University of Medical Sciences, accepting PH-550, General-660, SC-600, and ST-560 points in NEET. Uttar Pradesh, the lowest NEET cutoff for MBBS colleges is 606 points. I apologise, but you have no chance of begging for a spot in a UP government medical college at this rank. You should anticipate your rank to be between 47k and 48k at a score of 560.This year, though, it might be different because of a few different factors, such as the number of candidates with the highest score overall and the cutoff.The table below provides the previous year's cutoff and their corresponding marks for the 15% All India Quota and the 85% UP state quota NEET cut off 2023, in order to give candidates a fair idea of how many marks are required to get UP NEET admission 2023. This information only shows the most recent rank and comparable marks obtained.

faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to BPharm course of Uttar Pradesh University of Medical Sciences must be Class 12 or equivalent exam pass. There is no minimum aggregate mentioned by the authorities. However, the university can revise its eligibility requirements in an academic session. At the time of form filling and admission, the aspirants must hold the important documents (original and copies).
faqs.question: Q: What is the eligibility criteria for BPharm at UPUMS?

faqs.answer: Uttar Pradesh University of Medical Sciences eligibility varies course-wise. Candidates have to complete a minimum of Class 12 for UG courses and graduation for PG programmes. Below is UPUMS eligibility criteria for popular programmes:CourseCommon EligibilityMBBSClass 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/ Biotechnology and English subjects with at least 50% aggregateMDSBDS degree from a recognised universityMPharmBPharm with at least 55% aggregateBPharmClass 12GNMClass 12MChMD/ MS/ DNB or equivalent
faqs.question: Q: What is the eligibility for admission to various courses at UPUMS?

faqs.answer: Qualifying the NEET exam is necessary but not solely sufficient for admission to MBBS at UPUMS Candidates must also meet UPUMS academic requirements typically a minimum score in 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry and Biology. Selection is based on a merit list considering NEET scores and possibly reservations, Admission depends on rank, seat availability and domicile status. Aiming for a high NEET score is advisable and domicile reservations can affect competition. For precise details consult UPUMS official website or admissions office.
faqs.question: Q: Is NEET enough for Uttar Pradesh University of Medical Sciences, MBBS admissions?

faqs.answer: UPUMS is a well-known medical school with knowledgeable instructors, state-of-the-art facilities, and a 1050-bed hospital that provides a wealth of real-world experience.Graduates routinely get jobs in a variety of healthcare fields, including as government health services, pharmaceutical businesses, and reputable hospitals. With comparatively cheaper rates than many private medical colleges, UPUMS is a viable choice for students on a tight budget.Because medical studies are by their very nature difficult, UPUMS keeps a strict timetable with a lot of pressure and work. The competitive attitude may not be to everyone's taste and might be stressful. It might be challenging to balance school and personal obligations, necessitating good time management abilities. It may be challenging to locate comprehensive information about particular assignments, dorm amenities, and campus life on the university website.
