overview_faqs.question: Is Uttar Pradesh University of Medical Sciences good for MBBS?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Uttar Pradesh University of Medical Science is one of the important government Medical colleges in the state. The university offers many UG and PG courses such as MBBS, B.Sc, MD, MS, Diploma and many more. Upums is approved by the Medical Council Of India (MCI). The various specialisations which are being offered there are General medicine, General Surgery, Ophthalmology, Paediatrics, Orthopaedics, Obstetrics and Gynaecology. They offer many UG AND PG courses like MBBS, B.Sc, MD, MS, Diploma, etc. Around 98% of students are placed. The highest salary package is 3 LPA and the lowest salary package is 2 LPA.

overview_faqs.question: Is Uttar Pradesh University of Medical Sciences a good option?
overview_faqs.answer: UPUMS is a well-known medical school with knowledgeable instructors, state-of-the-art facilities, and a 1050-bed hospital that provides a wealth of real-world experience.Graduates routinely get jobs in a variety of healthcare fields, including as government health services, pharmaceutical businesses, and reputable hospitals. With comparatively cheaper rates than many private medical colleges, UPUMS is a viable choice for students on a tight budget.Because medical studies are by their very nature difficult, UPUMS keeps a strict timetable with a lot of pressure and work. The competitive attitude may not be to everyone's taste and might be stressful. It might be challenging to balance school and personal obligations, necessitating good time management abilities. It may be challenging to locate comprehensive information about particular assignments, dorm amenities, and campus life on the university website.

review_summary.college_name: UPUMS Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college has great study, infrastructure, and facilities.

content.Placements: The percentage of placement in my course is 40 to 45%, which is good according to other colleges. The package is high, speaking 5 LPA, and the minimum is 3.5 LPA. The companies recruiting the students include Ajanta, Bottling, HBQ Solution, and others. Talk about internships; students have got positions at ICICI Bank, V Smart, and others.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are good, like the freedom to use labs, the library, and other amenities. The infrastructure is good and well-designed, and the hostel facility has great security, both manually and digitally. The food quality is good in both the mess and canteen, and the medical facilities are great. There are also excellent sports facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Faculty is informative and knowledgeable.

content.Placements: 60% students are placed in our course. Highest package is very good, that is Rs. 4,00,000. Lower package is Rs. 1,50,000. Average package is good for males and females, which is Rs. 3,00,000. Cipla is a recruiting company. All students are interns in companies. Top role is pharmacist. A pass out student is working in any pharma company because the industry hires qualified students.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good and big. Telling about the library, it is very silent and simple. Classes are very clean, and Wi-Fi is available. Hostel food is good, and quality is better. A canteen and hospital are available on campus, and a gym is also available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The best college in the city was for the B.Pharma level and had good, helpful teachers.

content.Placements: Around 60 students get placed per year. The highest package offered by a company was 2 LPA, and the lowest package was 1.3 LPA. Apple Formulation Labs hired me. 70% of students were hired by companies. Internships were mandatory in our course.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel was very big. The infrastructure was very good, and the atmosphere was very clean. In our college, labs were very clean and disciplined. The library was very private, and the classrooms were big and very clean. Sports facilities were available, and a hospital was present on the campus. Canteens were available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with the college. It has very good infrastructure and good teaching qualit

content.Placements: B.Sc. in Nursing course at UPUMS has the highest placement rate about 98%. The highest package available is roughly around 12 LPA, but it is primarily for post-graduates. B.Sc. in Nursing graduate entry-level salaries can range from 2-4 LPA. Roles offered are nursing officers, SNO, ANS, etc.
content.Infrastructure: There are well-equipped labs, comprehensive libraries with Wi-Fi, classrooms with AC, a 24x7 electricity, and classrooms with projector facilities. Hostel facilities are good enough but the food available in the mess is very poor. The canteen provides good services. It also provides services to hostel buildings, proper medical facilities, and ambulances. Sports and games happen occasionally.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Reality of BCA in RBMI college.

content.Placements: The placement percentage is not so good at RBMI College. There is around 10% placement, and the highest package in my department is around 4 LPA. The top recruiting company in my department is TCS. Around 40% of students get internships from the campus, but there are no higher placement opportunities on campus.
content.Infrastructure: Our department's infrastructure is good enough, and we have two labs. The hostel is not so good, and the food quality is just average. Outings are only allowed on Sundays. The classrooms are good enough, and they have smart classrooms.

admission_overview.college_name: UPUMS Admission 2025: Application, Courses, Eligibility, Fees & Dates

paragraphs: UPUMS admissionsare primarily entrance-based. The university considers entrance-exams such as NEET, NEET-PG, NEET MDS, etc. for admission to specific courses.UPUMSalso conducts entrance test for admission to a few programmes. The university offers courses at UG and PG levels in multiple streams such as Medicine, Dentistry, Nursing, Paramedical, etc. Interested candidates have to apply for the exam accepted for the preferred course.
UPUMS offers full-time courses at UG and PG levels. Candidates have to follow the selection process applicable for their programme. Below are the key highlights forUPUMS admissions:
Particulars
UPUMS Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Ongoing:UG & PG
How to apply?
https://www.upums.ac.in/, exam-conducting body
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

UPUMS offers admission to courses mostly based on entrance-exam scores. Candidates also need to fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria to apply for admission. Below are popularUPUMS coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
*In the absence of information, generic eligibility is taken.

The total fee of UPUMS is a sum of various components such as one-time, tuition fee, hostel fee, etc. Candidates have to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the university. Aspirants have to pay the one-time fee only at the time of admission. Below isUPUMS feeand intake for top courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
UPUMS admission process includes multiple-steps. Candidates have to follow a specific process for each course. Below are the steps to get a seat in UPUMS:
Step 1: UPUMS Application Process 2025

Aspirants have to apply for NEET and NEET MDS for MBBS and MDS programmes, respectively. The application for MS, MD and MCh is also via accepted entrance exam. For all the other courses, candidates have to fill out the application form available on the university website.
Step 2: Selection

The university selects candidates based on national-level or university-level entrance-exam. The university conducts CPPNET for BPharm, GNM and ANM courses. UPUMS accepts NEET, NEET-MDS, NEET-PG, GPAT and NEET SS for specific courses.
Step 4: Counselling & Seat Allotment

Candidates applying for MBBS have to apply for UP NEET counselling for seat allotment. For all other courses, aspirants have to participate in the university counselling. The university releases a final merit-list announcing the seat allotted to candidates based on their entrance-exam and qualifying exam score.

courses_data.name: UPUMS BPharm Admission 2025
courses_data.description: UPUMS offers a four-year BPharm course divided into eight semesters. Candidates have to complete their Class 12 to apply for the BPharm programme. Admission is offered to 60 seats in the BPharm programme. The university conducts Combined Pharmacy Nursing Entrance Test to select candidates for the BPharm course.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for B.Pharm at UPUMS?
faqs.answer: Uttar Pradesh University of Medical Sciences has a total of 60 seats in BPharm course. The university offers seats to candidates based on their CPNET score. Candidates after qualifying the entrance-exam have to participate in UPUMS counselling conducted by the Faculty of Pharmacy for BPharm programme for seat allotment.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Uttar Pradesh University of Medical Sciences for B.Pharma?
faqs.answer: Uttar Pradesh University of Medical Sciences does not offer direct admission to BPharm course. Candidates have to first fill out the application form for BPharm. The university conducts a Combined Pharmacy Nursing Entrance Test or CPNET for admission to BPharm. Candidates qualifying the entrance-exam have to participate in the counselling conducted by the university.

placement_report.college_name: UPUMS Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: UPUMS Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per the NIRF report 2024 released by UPUMS, the median package offered during UG 4-year and UG 5-year placements 2023 stood at INR 1.92 LPA and INR 2.4 LPA , respectively. Further, the median package offered during PG 3-year placements 2023 stood at INR 14.75 LPA . Earlier, NIRF report 2023 is available on the official website. According to the NIRF report 2023, a total of 100 out of 202 MBBS and PG (3-year) students were placed during UPUMS placements 2022. The median package offered to MBBS and PG (3-year) students was INR 12 LPA and INR 10 LPA during placements 2022, respectively.

faqs.question: How are MBBS placements at Uttar Pradesh University of Medical Sciences?
faqs.answer: The placement report for 2023 has not yet been made public by the university. On the official website, the NIRF report for 2023 is accessible, though. A total of 100 out of 202 MBBS and PG (3-year) students were placed during UPUMS placements in 2022, according to the NIRF report 2023. During placements in 2022, the median package offered to MBBS and PG (3-year) students was INR 12 LPA and INR 10 LPA, respectively.Approximately 98% of pupils are assigned. Two LPA is the lowest salary package, and three LPA is the highest. Placements are available from M Cure Pharmaceutical, Sun Pharma Pvt Ltd, Mankind Pvt Ltd, and a few other national companies. The two most desirable positions are in another department and quality control.

faqs.question: What are the government job options after BPharm from UPUMS?
faqs.answer: Candidates with a valid BPharm degree of Uttar Pradesh University of Medical Sciences are eligible for job roles in the government sector. There are various central and state government organisations that post job opportunities for Pharmacy degree holders. Some of the popular job profiles for BPharm candidates are TSPSC Drug Inspector, MPSC Pharmacist, ESIC Pharmacist, SBI Pharmacist, etc.

For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 11173 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

UPUMS MBBS cutoff 2025 was 11173 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 11583 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by RBMI Group of Institutes, BareillyReviewed on 21 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college has great study, infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good, like the freedom to use labs, the library, and other amenities. The infrastructure is good and well-designed, and the hostel facility has great security, both manually and digitally. The food quality is good in both the mess and canteen, and the medical facilities are great. There are also excellent sports facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by RBMI Group of Institutes, BareillyReviewed on 2 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Faculty is informative and knowledgeable.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good and big. Telling about the library, it is very silent and simple. Classes are very clean, and Wi-Fi is available. Hostel food is good, and quality is better. A canteen and hospital are available on campus, and a gym is also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by RBMI Group of Institutes, BareillyReviewed on 5 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The best college in the city was for the B.Pharma level and had good, helpful teachers.
reviews.review_text: The hostel was very big. The infrastructure was very good, and the atmosphere was very clean. In our college, labs were very clean and disciplined. The library was very private, and the classrooms were big and very clean. Sports facilities were available, and a hospital was present on the campus. Canteens were available.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the college. It has very good infrastructure and good teaching qualit
reviews.review_text: There are well-equipped labs, comprehensive libraries with Wi-Fi, classrooms with AC, a 24x7 electricity, and classrooms with projector facilities. Hostel facilities are good enough but the food available in the mess is very poor. The canteen provides good services. It also provides services to hostel buildings, proper medical facilities, and ambulances. Sports and games happen occasionally.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by RBMI Group of Institutes, BareillyReviewed on 31 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Reality of BCA in RBMI college.
reviews.review_text: Our department's infrastructure is good enough, and we have two labs. The hostel is not so good, and the food quality is just average. Outings are only allowed on Sundays. The classrooms are good enough, and they have smart classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in rural set-up .
reviews.review_text:
Wi-Fi available in library 
Reading room is also there
Labs are well-equipped with modern instruments 
Lecture theatre are well-equipped with projector and centralized AC
Hostel are well furnished with mess 
And canteen 
Sports and games activities are also organised time to time.

reviews.review_heading: UPUMS MBBS students' life.
reviews.review_text: It is a top institute when compared in terms of infrastructure. There is a top-class hospital and labs available for each department. Hostel rooms are nice, but the only negative aspect is the mess food, which is not very good. We celebrate sports week twice a year and have an event called Exordium, which is the college festival that includes everything, including a DJ night.

reviews.review_heading: Summary of my college life so far.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure is well developed and have digital class room that are all air conditioned. The facility at the hostel are decent with appropriate cleanliness but sometimes one must file a complain if there is delay in any matter of concern. There is gym and sport area as well
With mess facil in each hostel
No canteen yet but it has been proposed and would be completely constructed in coming years.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: One of the best college when taking about infrastructure. Classrooms and libraries are well air conditioned. Labs are well equipped (though not top notch, but good). Hostels are good and spacious with common and TV rooms, though some maintainance is needed. Mess is good and food, you will find better than most of other mess. As it is medical college, we should not talk about medical facility, which is top notch. Sports culture is good here. In walking distance you will find a international stadi...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by RBMI Group of Institutes, BareillyReviewed on 31 Jul 2022)
reviews.review_heading: This college is ragging-free, and my experience is good.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi is available, and the speed is very fast. The classrooms are fine, and the library is big. The canteen is famous in our city, and it is like CCD.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are neat and clean. Hostel is very good and the food in the mess is delicious. Many types of sports like cricket and football are played. Students get free medical treatment. Wardens are very supportive.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by RBMI Group of Institutes, BareillyReviewed on 10 May 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of good faculty, and they are very helpful and motivated.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the hostel and food is good, and the infrastructure is very good. A gym is available for hostel students. The quality of labs and library is good. Every department has its own labs and a library. The canteen of the college is not so good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college, with great faculty and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college has one of the finest infrastructures among all medical colleges in Uttar Pradesh. The hostels are new, and the maintenance is very good. New fans and mattresses are provided whenever required. The library is air-conditioned and well built. The classrooms are great, have AC, projectors and are also spacious. The auditorium is top-notch. A gym is great and also has a badminton court. A few areas that need improvement are water coolers as they shut down sometimes, and there is no Wi-Fi...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by RBMI Group of Institutes, BareillyReviewed on 20 Sep 2021)
reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college for any course.
reviews.review_text: The area of the college is good. The campus has free Wi-Fi and computer labs with full facilities based on the latest technology. The classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and the campus has a large playground area with various sports equipment is available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by RBMI Group of Institutes, BareillyReviewed on 13 Sep 2021)
reviews.review_heading: RBMI helps students to make a good life.
reviews.review_text: Library, Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, labs, etc., are facilities available for our course. Large area, cleanness, etc., is the quality of the facilities in our hostel. The food quality is very good in the mess and canteen, and medical facilities and sports and games are also good.

college_info.intro:
Sandip University Nashik courses offer 100+ options to choose from. While some popular programs include BTech. The University offers BTech via its constituent schools such as the School of Engineering and Technology and the School of Computer Science and Engineering. It is available in various specialisations such as Aerospace Engineering, and many more. The University conducts its own SU JEE entrance exams considering which, candidates can earn a seat for themselves. However, the exam is optional, candidates must qualify for the accepted entrance exams such as JEE Mains, ISC, MHT CET, and many more with a good score to get admission within the respective choice of program. Chekc out the below video to know more about courses offered by Sandip University:

Exams such as or any state CET will be required for the candidates appearing for MBA.

faqs.answer: A:    Sandip University, Nashik offers a Master of Computer Applications (MCA) programme that is designed to provide students with a comprehensive understanding of computer applications and programming languages.about 50% of students who completed the MCA programme got placed. The average salary package offered to MCA graduates is 4.5 LPA. The university has a good placement record, and all top MNCs visit the campus for recruitment.
faqs.question: How are the placements of MCA in Sandip University, Nashik?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Sandip University Nashik offers international placements. The highest international package offered in 2025 was INR 112 LPA. The University also offers internship in countries such as Russia, Dubai and Germany.
faqs.question: Does Sandip University Nashik offer international placements?

faqs.answer: A:    The list of top recruiters during Sandip University Nashik placements in recent past is mentioned below:Company Namethe highest Package 2025IBMINR 80 LPAMetTel New York USAINR 73 LPAActewAGLINR 62.8 LPACryptocurrency Trading ExchangeINR 44 LPADeloitteINR 30 LPA
faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters during Sandip University Nashik placements?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Sandip University Nashik provides placement support to its students. Placement training programs and industry-specific sessions are conducted from the first year in all courses.
faqs.question: Does Sandip University, Nashik offer any placement support?

faqs.answer: A:    The Master of Business Administration programme at Sandip University, Nashik is not very expensive compared to other universities in India. The fee structure for the Master of Business Administration programme at Sandip University, Nashik varies depending on the specialuzations, but the range of INR 75 K to INR 4.9 Lacs (for 2 years-30 months).
faqs.question: Is MBA costly at Sandip University, Nashik?

faqs.answer: A:    Sandip University, Nashik accepts the following entrance exam scores for admission to its MBA program, as per the information available:CET (Common Entrance Test)XAT (Xavier Aptitude Test)MAT (Management Aptitude Test)CAT (Common Admission Test)Candidates who do not have a valid score or have not appeared in any of these exams can also apply for admission to the MBA programme at Sandip University, Nashik.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does Sandip University, Nashik accept for admission to MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    The Sandip University MBA application form requires students to upload scanned copies of various documents. Listed below are the required documents:UG marksheetsUG degreeClass 10 marksheetClass 12 marksheetMigration certificateSchool leaving certificate/transfer certificateCategory certificate (if applicable)Income certificate (applicable for candidates seeking admission via EWS category)Students who wish to apply offline should attach the photocopies of above-mentioned documents along with the duly filled form.
faqs.question: What documents are required to get admission to MBA at Sandip University?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates with an undergraduates degree from a recognised University or Institute and with a minimum 50% aggregate ( 45% for reserved category) can apply for admission at Sandip University MBA course.The Sandip University MBA admissions are entrace- based, candidate who meet the eligibility criteria have to appear for CAT/ XAT/ MAT or any state CET and then they have to appear for SU JEE- MBA. The last selection round is of GD PI. Candidates who clear all the selection rounds will be intimidated by Sandip University through Email or Call or SMS.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The college is moderately good, with average-quality education.

review_content.Placements: Only 15% of students are placed in my college. The highest package is 8.4 LPA, the lowest is 2.4 LPA, and the average is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Mahindra and Tata Motors. Only 20% of students got internships. The top roles include mechanical engineering designer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are well-maintained. The labs have equipment, but most of it is not working. The Wi-Fi is not too bad. The library has good enough books. The hostel facilities are basic, with basic furniture. The food is always available but does not taste too good. There are a lot of canteens available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: All the above is true, and you can take admission if you want to.

review_content.Placements: The pass students are placed. 3-4 students got placed in last year. The highest package is 50 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA to 4 LPA. There are many companies like Bosch, Mahindra, Infosys, etc. Around 30 to 40 students are placed in my college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure available for our course department is very good. The infrastructure is very well-maintained. There are labs, libraries, and ground. Quality of food and other facilities is available. Overall, it is good.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are really helpful, good, qualified, and knowledgeable. They provide little bite quality. It makes the students industry-ready. Semester exams are not that much difficult. But the proper guidance and proper study can beat it.

faqs.answer: Sandip University conducts its entrance exams called SUJEE for admissions to the BTech program. So candidates have the option to either qualify from other entrance exams such as JEE Mains or MHT CET, or they can straight away appear for SUJEE and qualify for their desired program.Candidates are supposed to qualify 10+2 with 45%-50% aggregate (differs from programme to program). Exams such as CBSE class 12, ISC, MHT CET, Maharashtra HSC, or SU JEE are valid for eligibility for admissions.
faqs.question: Q: What is the selection criteria for BTech admission at Sandip University?

faqs.answer: The Master of Business Administration programme at Sandip University, Nashik is not very expensive compared to other universities in India. The fee structure for the Master of Business Administration programme at Sandip University, Nashik varies depending on the specialuzations, but the range of INR 75 K to INR 4.9 Lacs (for 2 years-30 months).
faqs.question: Q: Is MBA costly at Sandip University, Nashik?

faqs.answer: Sandip University MBA is a two-year, full-time course offered across different specialisations. The University offers two kinds of MBA, MBA in Marketing Management/ Financial Management/ HRM/ International BusinessNew Age MBA in Business Analytics/ Banking and Financial Services The total tuition fees of MBA at Sandip University ranges between INR 2.48 Lacs and INR 4.90 lakh. On the other hand the average package offered during Sandip University Placements 2023 was INR 12 LPA and the the highest Package offered was INR 28 LPA. Therefore, it can be seen that the ROI on Sandip University is on the positive side of the graph. Hence, Sandip University MBA can be considered as a good college to pursue MBA from.
faqs.question: Q: Is Sandip University good for MBA?

faqs.answer: Yes, the Sandip University degree is valid. The University holds UGC approval which makes it prestigious enough to own a degree from. Apart from being a member of AIU, Sandip University also owns a solid grip on global exposure via various collaborations with companies and organizations present nationally and internationally such as Giggle Galaxy Pvt Ltd, (ImaginXP) Pune, University of Putra, Malaysia, and many more.For a better holistic approach, the University makes sure to provide it all through various programs and beneficial schemes at the student’s disposal. The Sandip Group of Institutions grades an ‘A’ as per the NAAC with the highest scoring of 3.11.

Other than this, students who opt for hostel facilitties must pay the hostel fees of INR 1.1 lakh per annum. Students are also required to pay the one-time hostel deposit of INR 5,000. Tabulated below are more fee components that are to be paid by the st

course_faqs.question: What is the hostel fee for B.Pharma students at Sandip University?
course_faqs.answer: The hostel fees at Sandip University is charged on an annual basis. As per the official website, the fee to be paid by students opting for hostel facilitties is INR 1.1 Lacs per annum. Other than this, students who wish to opt for these facilities must also pay a security deposit of INR 5,000. The university also provides transportation facilities for students living on campus premises. However, the transportation fees is not available.Note: The above-mentioned fee is as per the official website

course_faqs.question: Does B.Pharma curriculum at Sandip University support practical learning?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, Sandip University recognises the importance of practical learning by including various practical subjects in the BPharma curriculum. These subjects help students understand the application of theoretical courses learnt in the classroom. Listed below are the pratical subjects taught in this programme:Herbal Drug TechnologySocial Pharmacy Medicinal ChemistryBio Chemistry and Clinical PathologyStudents can check out the BPharma syllabus page to learn more.

review_summary.college_name: Sandip University Nashik Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Many reputed companies came here. More than 80 percent of students were placed last year from my course. The highest package was not disclosed yet, and recruiting companies like IBM, Infosys, Accenture, etc., came here for recruitment and got a good placement.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very awesome at Sandip University. It is located in Nashik, and the climate is very good. It always rains there. The hostel is good; there are 4-sharing rooms, and 2-sharing rooms are also available. There are also 4 messes. Veg and non-veg options are available here.

individual_reviews.course: BBA LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Supportive faculty, balanced law and management course, good facilities, and vibrant campus life.

content.Placements: The BBA LLB (Hons) course at Sandip University offers decent placement opportunities. Around 65-75% of students get placed each year. The highest package ranges from 7 LPA to 8 LPA, the lowest is around 3 LPA, and the average stands at 4.5 LPA to 5 LPA. Top recruiters include corporate firms like TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Capgemini, as well as law firms and consulting companies like Deloitte and KPMG. Nearly 80-90% of students secure internships in courts, law firms, NGOs, and corporate houses. Common roles offered are legal associate, corporate legal executive, compliance analyst, HR or business analyst, and litigation intern, ensuring a diverse career path.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is moderately good, with average-quality education.

content.Placements: Only 15% of students are placed in my college. The highest package is 8.4 LPA, the lowest is 2.4 LPA, and the average is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Mahindra and Tata Motors. Only 20% of students got internships. The top roles include mechanical engineering designer.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are well-maintained. The labs have equipment, but most of it is not working. The Wi-Fi is not too bad. The library has good enough books. The hostel facilities are basic, with basic furniture. The food is always available but does not taste too good. There are a lot of canteens available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: All the above is true, and you can take admission if you want to.

content.Placements: The pass students are placed. 3-4 students got placed in last year. The highest package is 50 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA to 4 LPA. There are many companies like Bosch, Mahindra, Infosys, etc. Around 30 to 40 students are placed in my college.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure available for our course department is very good. The infrastructure is very well-maintained. There are labs, libraries, and ground. Quality of food and other facilities is available. Overall, it is good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are really helpful, good, qualified, and knowledgeable. They provide little bite quality. It makes the students industry-ready. Semester exams are not that much difficult. But the proper guidance and proper study can beat it.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Sandip University- Gate way of dream life.

content.Placements: Placements are good. They have a job fair for everyone. Where students across all cities are called. Multiple companies come here. Apart from job fairs, there are campus placements twice a year. Also, they provide internships to know the industry well. Also, students are asked to give mock interviews in college.
content.Infrastructure: It has state-of-the-art infrastructure. Huge campus of 274 acres which can accommodate large crowds. Overall there are too many facilities on campus. Sports complex which has football ground, cricket ground, and badminton court with basketball and tennis court. It also has multiple canteens and food courts.

admission_overview.college_name: Sandip University Nashik Admission 2026: Courses, Eligibility & Selection Criteria

admission_overview.title: Sandip University, Nashik Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Sandip University Nashik admissions are mostly entrance-based. The university offers various courses at the UG, PG and Diploma levels. The courses are offered in full-time as well as part-time mode through the different schools of Sandip University. Admission to Sandip University courses is entrance-based. For admission to Sandip University MBA needs to appear for CAT/ XAT/ MAT or any state CET or Sandip University Joint Entrance test (SU JEE- MBA). Sandip University BTech admissions are done through SUJ-JEE/ MH-CET/ JEE Mains. Read the following article to know about the admissions process of Sandip University, Nashik.

eligibility_selection.title: Sandip University, Nashik Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Sandip University course admission is subject to fulfilment of the preset admission criteria. Students seeking admission to Sandip University courses must check the eligibility criteria before applying. For UG admissions, Class 12 is required and graduation is needed for PG admissions. The table below has eligibility and selection for Sandip University Courses:

courses_table.eligibility: Bachelor's Degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% for reserved category) from a recognised institute or university
courses_table.selection_criteria: CAT/ XAT/ MAT/ SU MAT/ any other state CET

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with Physics/ Mathematics / Chemistry/ Computer Science/ Electronics/ Information Technology/ Biology/ Informatics Practices/ Biotechnology/ Technical Vocational subject/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business Studies/ Entrepreneurship and at least 45% aggregate Or Three years Diploma with a minimum 45% aggregate
courses_table.selection_criteria: SU JEE/ JEE Mains/ MH CET

courses_table.eligibility: Bachelor's Degree in a relevant field
Class 12 with Science and Mathematics from a recognised board with a minimum 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category)

faqs.answer: The latest cutoff of Sandip University, Nashik has not been released by the university yet.However, the eligibility criteria for admission to the MCA programme at Sandip University, Nashik is a graduation degree (e.g., B.E/B.Tech/B.Sc/B.Com/B.A./B.Voc., etc.) with Mathematics at 10+2 level or at graduation level, obtaining at least 50% marks (45% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) in the qualifying examination. Candidates who have no Mathematics background will have to take a compulsory bridge course framed by the respective university/institution and additional bridge courses related to computer subjects as per the norms of the university.
faqs.question: Can I know the latest cutoff for MCA at Sandip University, Nashik?

faqs.answer: The Admission At Sandip University begin after 31 May each year. The Admission procedure is as follows:Enter your full Name as mentioned on the SSC result along with your registered mobile number.In the next section include the appropriate Personal details.In the “Program details” section ensure that you include proper options for the highest Qualification, Select School, Course Stream and Admission Year.Fill all the required “Education Details” as per your Qualification.Upload all the required scanned documents such as SSC, HSC & Graduation result. The Documents are accepted in PDF Format only.Proceed for your online payment to complete the payment.After successful payment, you will receive the confirmation of provisional registration details on your registered email and phone no.
faqs.question: When do admissions begin at Sandip University, Nashik?

faqs.answer: Candidates with an undergraduates degree from a recognised University or Institute and with a minimum 50% aggregate ( 45% for reserved category) can apply for admission at Sandip University MBA course.The Sandip University MBA admissions are entrace- based, candidate who meet the eligibility criteria have to appear for CAT/ XAT/ MAT or any state CET and then they have to appear for SU JEE- MBA. The last selection round is of GD PI. Candidates who clear all the selection rounds will be intimidated by Sandip University through Email or Call or SMS.
faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for Sandip University MBA?

paragraphs: Sandip University admission process starts with online application form filling followed by qualifying for the selection rounds. The application process can be completed online. Interested students can check below the steps ofSandip University admission process:
Sandip University Application Process
Candidates are required to fill out the application form online on the official website of the college. To be eligible to apply, candidates are required to fill out the criteria set by the college.
Sandip UniversitySelection Round

Sandip University selects candidates for some UG and PG courses based on some entrance exams accepted by the college. The college accepts CAT/ XAT/ MAT/ SU JEE/ JEE Mains/ MH CET/GATE/ SUN- GATE and others for admission to MBA, BTech and MTech, respectively. Additionally, for other courses, the college offers merit-based admission.
Admission Confirmation
The candidates selected for the course must complete their enrollment by submitting the required fee within the given deadline to secure their seats.
For more details about Admission Process of Sandip University check out the below video:

placement_report.college_name: Sandip University Nashik Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: Sandip University Nashik Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Sandid University provides placement support to students across all disciplines including Management, Engineering, Pharmacy, Law and more. The University starts the placement training process from the first academic year itself. Students enroll in value added programs and take certifications in areas such as Aptitude, Communication and programming Languages. Sandip University Nashik conducts specialised training such as mock interviews, industry-specific sessions and group discussions.
According to the latest available data, the overall highest and average package recorded during Sandip University Nashik placements 2025 was INR 112 LPA and 12 LPA .

hostel_campus.college_name: Sandip University Nashik Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very awesome at Sandip University. It is located in Nashik, and the climate is very good. It always rains there. The hostel is good; there are 4-sharing rooms, and 2-sharing rooms are also available. There are also 4 messes. Veg and non-veg options are available here.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty, balanced law and management course, good facilities, and vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: Sandip University offers Wi-Fi classrooms, a moot court hall, and a well-stocked library with legal databases. Hostels are Wi-Fi-enabled with decent mess food. The campus has 24x7 medical aid, a canteen, sports facilities, and a gym, ensuring a student-friendly environment.

reviews.review_heading: The college is moderately good, with average-quality education.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are well-maintained. The labs have equipment, but most of it is not working. The Wi-Fi is not too bad. The library has good enough books. The hostel facilities are basic, with basic furniture. The food is always available but does not taste too good. There are a lot of canteens available.

reviews.review_heading: All the above is true, and you can take admission if you want to.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure available for our course department is very good. The infrastructure is very well-maintained. There are labs, libraries, and ground. Quality of food and other facilities is available. Overall, it is good.

reviews.review_heading: Sandip University- Gate way of dream life.
reviews.review_text: It has state-of-the-art infrastructure. Huge campus of 274 acres which can accommodate large crowds. Overall there are too many facilities on campus. Sports complex which has football ground, cricket ground, and badminton court with basketball and tennis court. It also has multiple canteens and food courts.

reviews.review_heading: Better for middle-class families and others as well.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our department include Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. The quality of facilities in our hostel is average. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is also average.  Ambulance is available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: College is budget-friendly, and also satisfied with faculty and infrastructure of college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are excellent. Classrooms consist of good board view space, Wi-Fi, and all digital-based classrooms. Presence of a central library full of course books and non-course books. A digital library is also included in the central library. Labs are very comfortable and have good machines and materials to perform experiments. Coming to the food, there are two menu systems - North and South. Food quality is very fine. Hostel facilities are good. Every room has a Wi-Fi fa...

reviews.review_heading: Sandip University gateway to a dream life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is the finest in the city it has 275 acres campus which feels unreal. Several Canteens and garden multiple libraries a huge sports complex consisting of football ground, cricket ground, basketball court, tennis court and kabbadi ground. Along with it multiple labs.

reviews.review_heading: Good for studying.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available for every registered student, and labs, classrooms, and the library are available in the college. The hostel in my college is good, but we have to adjust to the food. We can play on the grounds of the college, and medical facilities are available at all times.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sandip University, Nashik.
reviews.review_text: Our college mess and canteen are good. Sports and games are organized in our college. Medical facilities and other things are provided by the college. Our college library is so valuable and big for students. They also provide us with many things.

reviews.review_heading: It has the best climate. It is the best college in the city.
reviews.review_text: The department offers well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a rich library. Hostels are decent with clean rooms. Mess and canteen food is average. Medical facilities are available on campus. Sports and games facilities are good and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: From my side, this college is good, because the teaching staff is so good.
reviews.review_text: Some facilities are good, and some are bad like Wi-Fi, classrooms, canteen, and food are not very good. Medical facilities are good. There are no sports here. There is a sports ground but they cannot teach sports. They force us to play.

reviews.review_heading: Sandip University, Nashik.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at Sandip University is top-notch. Classrooms have projectors and TV screens for a better understanding of concepts. The quality of facilities in my hostel is above average. The food in the mess is good. Medical facilities are present on campus.  Also, having two grounds on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Sandip University is worth it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is above average. In some classrooms, Wi-Fi, digital TVs, and AC are available, but in others, these facilities are not available. The maintenance of hostels is also above average. The food in the canteen is of poor quality, and many students are getting sick due to acidity. There is one ambulance in the college, so the medical facilities are good. There are separate grounds for cricket, football, and volleyball. It has very good facilities for sports.

reviews.review_heading: Students of Sandip University.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are very good to see, and Wi-Fi is available in labs in our college. There are two central libraries for this course. There is good food, chicken is nice to eat, and some other food, like vada pav, is so nice.

data.description: Sandip University owns a great panel of experienced faculty from various renowned institutions. The University takes great pride in having PhD qualifications from IITs and NITs across India. Being experienced in their fields, it becomes easy for the University to meet the agenda of raising stakeholders for the University and creating value for the curriculum.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Sandip University, Nashik

likes.text: The recruiting companies at the college are Wipro, Deloitte, TCS, ABB, and various local companies.
Numerous reputed companies offer almost all internships to paid associate engineers, analysts, and web developers.

Really decent placements opportunities are offered such as great hostel facilities with all amenities and single as well as shared room with AC and non.

The course curriculum is designed in a manner that provides us with skill- and knowledge-based training.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Information Technology - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: My honest review about my college.

content.Placements: Placements and job opportunities are very good in the engineering line. And in our college placements and job opportunities are very good. So many companies are coming to our college for placements like Larson and Tubro, Rhine Engineering Pvt Ltd. They also get a stipend of Rs. 15,000. Also, good training in various branches of our technical field. It is overall average.
content.Infrastructure: Information Technology and Mathematical Innovation is a professional program that has a duration of 4 years and has 8 semesters in total. The course includes experiments, hands-on projects, innovative projects, model implementation, and much more. The days are full of learning and exams are a little tiring. I stay near to my college, I didn't go to PG hostels, but the review was good. Also, recommend others for the same. The fee is also affordable for any type of PG student from another city or any other country.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sigma University.

content.Placements: Above 70% of students got placements last year from my course. The highest package offered was 6.5 LPA. The lowest was 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Amazon, Uno Mind, L&T, UPL, Inox, and Godrej. Recently 60% of students got internships in our city in Vary company.
content.Infrastructure: There are three buildings. One for degree students, one for diploma, and one for pharmacy. All buildings are good. Good creativity on the walls has been shown. Wi-Fi is there. Labs are there for each subject. The Outdoor is too good. In the front, we have a main auditorium, where we play cricket most of the time. Behind the campus, there is one big football ground. So many facilities are there.

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied of management and classroom and washrooms.

Classrooms are okay or below average because some do not have properly working fans and are hot. The library is very good and silent, and it provides every book used in engineering. paragraphs: Sigma University admissionsis based on merit/entrance exam/counselling/in-house entrance exam as per respective courses. Candidates can apply online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Sigma University is as per the steps below:
1: Sigma University Application Process

The mode of application is online. Aspirants need to apply at the official website for all courses, i.e., https://admissions23.sigmauniversity.ac.in/. The application fee for PhD course is INR 1,500. The payment should be made online by credit card/debit card/net banking. Candidates can fill out the application form on the university's official website.
2: Selection

The university admits students based on GUJCET followed by ACPC Counselling, Merit, Entrance Exam + Viva as per respective courses. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

After the release of theSigma University cutoff, aspirants with scores equal or above the cutoff get a seat. The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Selected aspirants need to come for document verification. Aspirants need to pay theSigma University feeto confirm their seats in the university.

description: Sigma University cutoff 2025 is finally out for candidates seeking admission to BTech and BPharma programs. The GUJCET cutoff has been released for all categories and rounds for students belonging to the HS and AI quota. Candidates can also view other exam cutoffs from the exam-wise sections given below. Further updates are down below:

The Sigma University cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Sigma University BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 22015 and 39821 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering. The first round cutoff rank for the same

On the contrary the least competitive specialisations for admission in 2024 were B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering and with closing cutoff ranks of a

Sigma University GUJCET cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and for all categories and quotas in the form of opening and closing ranks. In 2025, Sigma University B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, ranged from 14506 to 50639 for students belonging to the General HS quota.

Among all the specialisations, B.Tech. in Artificial Intellgence and Data Science and B.Tech. in Cyber Security were the most competitive for admission in the General HS category. To view the first and last rounds' cutoff ranks

reviews.review_heading: My honest review about my college.
reviews.review_text: Information Technology and Mathematical Innovation is a professional program that has a duration of 4 years and has 8 semesters in total. The course includes experiments, hands-on projects, innovative projects, model implementation, and much more. The days are full of learning and exams are a little tiring. I stay near to my college, I didn't go to PG hostels, but the review was good. Also, recommend others for the same. The fee is also affordable for any type of PG student from another city or ...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sigma University.
reviews.review_text: There are three buildings. One for degree students, one for diploma, and one for pharmacy. All buildings are good. Good creativity on the walls has been shown. Wi-Fi is there. Labs are there for each subject. The Outdoor is too good. In the front, we have a main auditorium, where we play cricket most of the time. Behind the campus, there is one big football ground. So many facilities are there.

reviews.review_heading: If you want the college days you dream then no need to come.
reviews.review_text: The college lacks Wi-Fi, and there is no air conditioning. It doesn’t have a canteen like some other colleges. The canteen is rented out. Labs are acceptable, but you won’t have many opportunities to use them, as access is mostly limited to exams. Classroom facilities are okay, but there could be improvements.

reviews.review_heading: Review on sigma university .
reviews.review_text: Our social work department has modern classrooms seminar rooms and an auditorium. We have access to a library. The department has a computer lab which provides opportunities for research and paperwork. The hostel facilities are satisfactory. Our hostel has clean rooms bathrooms a common room and sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied of management and classroom and washrooms.
reviews.review_text: The college does not have Wi-Fi facilities, except for one network that provides only 30 MB, which is not enough. Labs are average, and some are still under maintenance. Classrooms are okay or below average because some do not have properly working fans and are hot. The library is very good and silent, and it provides every book used in engineering. I don't have any experience with the hostel, but my friend lives there and says it is not a good place to stay, is very dirty, and lacks cleanliness...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's good if you have to study and extra curriculum activities.
reviews.review_text: Me and my friends are not in the hostel, so we don’t know much about it, but it’s far away from college, like 2-3 km, and I don’t think they provide a mess or canteen in the hostel. Their hostel is like a guest house, not too many facilities, and the same goes for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: B.Tech in IT from the Sigma University.
reviews.review_text: Our college had a decent infrastructure for the IT course. All the necessary facilities, such as labs, libraries, canteens, Wi-Fi, sports, etc., were available for the students. The campus of the college was big and had ample parking space. Students were also getting hostel facilities at the college.

reviews.review_heading: Best college and best experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the labs and classrooms is top-notch, allowing us to focus on our studies. Free Wi-Fi is also available. Hostel facilities are also available in the college. Separate hostels for boys and girls are provided. The food quality is also amazing.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sigma University.
reviews.review_text: The management department's infrastructure is exceptional. In fact, all the departments have good infrastructure. The classrooms are CCTV equipped. There are different libraries in the respective departments. A swimming pool and gym are available for fitness freaks.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good faculty members and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, a smart library, and an advanced computer lab were available in our college. Our department was good. Our college had a good atmosphere, a sports area, and a cricket ground.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for learning skills.
reviews.review_text: The campus is furnished with amenities including a canteen, library, lodging, labs, etc. The only place with Wi-Fi is the seminar room. Although the hostel has room for 170 students, rooms are assigned based on merit and a personal interview. It has a supervised fitness center for employees and students. Treadmills, workout benches, and other tools for lifting weights are included. The canteen at the college is spacious. 200 students can be accommodated at once. It attempts to offer wholesome me...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college.
reviews.review_text: There is a huge lab in our college. It has many classrooms and many auditoriums. It provides a hostel facility for both girls and boys. There are many canteens on our campus. The food served in the hostel is best. There is high security in our college.

reviews.review_heading: This is a good college because of its good placements.
reviews.review_text: College and hostel both place are Wi-Fi is enabled, but short-range. The food served is medium test and quality to provide. Hostel is good, and I have enjoyed it. Security is available in both place and active all camera and security, which is completely secure and safe.

reviews.review_heading: This is a great place to recieve knowledge. It provides supportive faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. It has different buildings for students of different streams. It has all the necessary amenities like well-equipped laboratories and classrooms. There is audiovisual aid in the classroom which helps in better learning. The library is filled with a variety of books required.

reviews.review_heading: Really good faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the campus includes all the amenities like labs, audio visual rooms and common rooms like auditorium. There are also a large variety of equipment to study and gain practical knowledge. Also many services like audio visual room for Learning.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Sigma University

The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Stanley Medical College:

faqs.answer: A:    The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Stanley Medical College is approximately INR 74500 - INR 161688.
faqs.question: What is the fee range for the courses offered at Stanley Medical College?

reviews_list.batch_info: MD in General Medicine - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I like to study in this college as academically it is a very good college.

review_content.Placements: As we complete our course up to the final year, we should work in the same college for 1 year, for which they pay Rs. 30,000 per month, which will increase every year by 5%. If you have any interest in doing PG, you can do it by taking another entrance exam, which is NEET PG. If not, we can work in different hospitals, which may pay you a minimum amount of 60-70k due to the reputation of the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is rum by government and is only average in infrastructure. You get only the basics. The cleanliness is average. All the buildings are old and need renovation, which is currently being carried out. The bathrooms are common, and we have a common dining area. The food is pretty good as it is a student-run mess and not contract-based. The hostel has a gym, a library, a study room, a recreation room, and Wi-Fi.

reviews_list.batch_info: MD in Paediatrics - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I love the college, and it is great overall.

review_content.Placements: The overall placement percentage of our college including all the departments in medical is 100%. The college is good in terms of industry-related engagement. Seminars conducted by the college help students in getting good placements and internship opportunities from the college itself.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and the infrastructure available in our college are a big lab for testing and other research objective. We have access to 24x7 Wi-Fi facilities in the hostel and in the library. The college has a good canteen and also a very good mess for our meals.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee range for the courses offered at Stanley Medical College?
overview_faqs.answer: The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Stanley Medical College is approximately INR 74500 - INR 161688.

overview_faqs.question: Is Stanley Medical College a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Stanley Medical College is a renowned institution offering PG Diploma, MD, MS, UG Diploma, DM, M.Ch, MBBS. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Medicine & Health Sciences, Nursing. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Stanley Medical College boasts an impressive review rating of 4.01 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 3.69 for Campus Life, 3.92 for Placements, 4.38 for Faculty, and 3.85 for Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: Can Stanley Medical College be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Stanley Medical College is a reputed institute for DM, M.Ch., PG Diploma, MBBS, MD, MS, UG Diploma. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Medicine & Health Sciences, Nursing. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Stanley Medical College has a review rating of 4.6 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.8 on campuslife, 4.7 on placements, 4.5 on faculty and 4.3 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Stanley Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MD in Paediatrics - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Excellent case loads with a variety of patients.

content.Placements: Placement in government hospitals is done by writing a government examination. General practice can be done in private hospitals, and normal practice can be done by having a clinic. The college provides internship facilities, and the stipend given is almost Rs. 13,000.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is now renovated and spacious. The food here is tasty, and the menu provides all the nutrients. Every day, there will be non-veg and veg to choose from. Hostellers are to be paid monthly for mess bills and room rents, which combined come around 3-4k per month on average. Each room has 3 members, and the water and current facilities are continuous.

individual_reviews.course: MS in Orthopaedics - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college crowd is really very awesome.

content.Placements: The percentage of the students getting placed in our college is 100%. The college also provides students with internship opportunities. The college has almost 100% of internships. The highest salary package offered is 30 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and the infrastructure provided to us in the college are very good. We have all the facilities like Wi-Fi, a library, air-conditioned rooms, hostels, and a lab. The food quality of the mess and canteen is also really good.

individual_reviews.course: MD in General Medicine - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I like to study in this college as academically it is a very good college.

content.Placements: As we complete our course up to the final year, we should work in the same college for 1 year, for which they pay Rs. 30,000 per month, which will increase every year by 5%. If you have any interest in doing PG, you can do it by taking another entrance exam, which is NEET PG. If not, we can work in different hospitals, which may pay you a minimum amount of 60-70k due to the reputation of the college.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is rum by government and is only average in infrastructure. You get only the basics. The cleanliness is average. All the buildings are old and need renovation, which is currently being carried out. The bathrooms are common, and we have a common dining area. The food is pretty good as it is a student-run mess and not contract-based. The hostel has a gym, a library, a study room, a recreation room, and Wi-Fi.

individual_reviews.course: MD in Paediatrics - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I love the college, and it is great overall.

content.Placements: The overall placement percentage of our college including all the departments in medical is 100%. The college is good in terms of industry-related engagement. Seminars conducted by the college help students in getting good placements and internship opportunities from the college itself.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and the infrastructure available in our college are a big lab for testing and other research objective. We have access to 24x7 Wi-Fi facilities in the hostel and in the library. The college has a good canteen and also a very good mess for our meals.

individual_reviews.course: MD in General Medicine - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for the general medicine course.

content.Placements: Our college placements are perfect. We have a dedicated placement cell that looks after the internships and placements-related queries in our college. The college has an overall placement percentage of 100%, which applies to internship opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in our college are good and the infrastructure is awesome. The course has all the amenities which are required by any student for a good 2 years of college. The food and the hostel quality in the college is also really good.

description: Stanley Medical College cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Stanley Medical College NEET PG cutoff 2025 will be released soon. The institute accepts NEET PG scores for admission to PG courses. The cutoff was released category-wise for candidates belonging to the All India quota. Candidates can find below the category-wise cutoff for Stanley Medical College based on NEET PG for the past three years:

Stanley Medical College NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 6781 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Stanley Medical College MBBS cutoff 2025 was 6781 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 19763 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Stanley Medical College accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Stanley Medical College NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD and MS. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 22011 to 91546. According to this range, the most and least competitive courses are MS and MD, respectively. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Stanley Medical College MS cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were MS in Orthopaedics, followed by MS in Ophthalmology. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 22011 and 23432, respectively.
Students can refer to the table below to know NEET PG cutoffs across different categories, courses, and years.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

Stanley Medical College NEET SS Cutoff 2024 was released for the concluding round in the form of ranks for admission to M.Ch., DM courses across multiple specialisations. The cutoff was released for various categories belonging to the AI quota.

In the first round, Stanley Medical College M.Ch. cutoff 2024 ranged from 25 to 2713 for students in the General AI category. was the toughest to get into. turned out to be the most easiest for admission.

In this section, candidates can find out the category-wise NEET SS cutoff 2024 and 2023. In 2024, for the General AI quota, the NEET SS cutoff was closed at 22 for M.Ch. in Hand Surgery. In 2023, the same specialisation cutoff was capped at 11.
For more in-depth details for the previous year cutoffs, please refer to the table provided below and make use of the filters available to refine your search on the basis of rounds and category.

NEET SS is the accepting exam for Stanley Medical College admission to various Super Speciality Courses. Candidates appearing for NEET SS can refer to the table below to view the important NEET SS 2025 dates.
Students can view or download the round and year-wise consolidated NEET SS cutoff PDFs for Stanley Medical College. This will help students to understand the year-wise cutoff trends.

Stanley Medical College MBBS Cutoff 2024 has been released for Round 1. The cutoff was released category-wise for candidates belonging to different categories under the HS quota. In 2024, for the General HS category candidates, the cutoff rank during Round 1 was closed at 276. For the OBC HS category candidates, the cutoff was closed at 385.

Stanley Medical College Cutoff 2024 has been released for its second round based on candidates' performance in the Tamil Nadu NEET PG exam. The Round 2 cutoff for admission to the MD was ranged between 60 and 3198, for the General HS quota. For the OBC category candidates, the cutoff ranks for the same course stood between 118 and 2566.

hostel_campus.college_name: Stanley Medical College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Excellent case loads with a variety of patients.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is now renovated and spacious. The food here is tasty, and the menu provides all the nutrients. Every day, there will be non-veg and veg to choose from. Hostellers are to be paid monthly for mess bills and room rents, which combined come around 3-4k per month on average. Each room has 3 members, and the water and current facilities are continuous.

reviews.review_heading: The college crowd is really very awesome.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and the infrastructure provided to us in the college are very good. We have all the facilities like Wi-Fi, a library, air-conditioned rooms, hostels, and a lab. The food quality of the mess and canteen is also really good.

reviews.review_heading: I like to study in this college as academically it is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is rum by government and is only average in infrastructure. You get only the basics. The cleanliness is average. All the buildings are old and need renovation, which is currently being carried out. The bathrooms are common, and we have a common dining area. The food is pretty good as it is a student-run mess and not contract-based. The hostel has a gym, a library, a study room, a recreation room, and Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: I love the college, and it is great overall.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and the infrastructure available in our college are a big lab for testing and other research objective. We have access to 24x7 Wi-Fi facilities in the hostel and in the library. The college has a good canteen and also a very good mess for our meals.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for the general medicine course.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college are good and the infrastructure is awesome. The course has all the amenities which are required by any student for a good 2 years of college. The food and the hostel quality in the college is also really good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has top-notch education facilities and excellent faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure, and there are 4 main buildings on the campus. The classrooms have centralized air conditioning along with smart boards. The college library has an updated stock of course-related books, journals, and other materials. On the college campus, we have Wi-Fi, and labs have all the equipment for practice. The canteen food is also good, and they offer a variety of snacks. Our college has hostel facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The best college for MS Orthopedics course.
reviews.review_text: I loved the time there; we had labs, did our practical classes, and had other basic facilities like washrooms and canteens. We had hostels for girls and boys, medical assistants available to us, and food in our mess. The central library is under construction and has a functional library.

reviews.review_heading: The best college for MD in Pediatrics course.
reviews.review_text: I loved my time here. We had labs, we did our practical classes and had other basic facilities including washrooms and q canteen. We had hostels for both girls and boys and medical assistants were available to us along with food in our mess. Medical facilities are readily available on campus ensuring timely healthcare assistance.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of placement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good, there was classroom and library we had lab classes and also we can take hostel facility. The hostel was clean and there was water and electricity supply along with Wi-Fi facility available for students. We had a common sports room were boys and girls both were allowed to play.

reviews.review_heading: My medical college journey.
reviews.review_text: We were provided with a Wi-Fi facility but only in the library, well-equipped labs, and spacious classrooms. Separate hostel facilities were provided for different gender and the water and electricity supply was 24*7. We had medical facilities and sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Stanley Medical College.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, labs, a library, an auditorium, parking facilities for two-wheelers and four-wheelers, a coops store, and a canteen are provided in our college. The hostel has clean and neat rooms. It serves good food and provides a ground for games like football, volleyball, cricket, basketball, and hockey.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is an excellent college for South Indian students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. This college was founded in 1938. It is the oldest college in Tamil Nadu. The hostel infrastructure is also good. They provide a separate hostel for each batch. They provide a separate hostel for the first year. In the first year, they allotted one room for four girls.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for medical education.
reviews.review_text: In our college, Wi-Fi can be used only in library for purposes like journals and research work, not for personal use. Labs are well-equipped with modern equipment. Classrooms are clean, spacious and well maintained. New lecture halls are air-conditioned. Library has an air-conditioned self-reading room and a lot of books at different compartments. First year hostels are in old buildings, but well maintained and sufficient enough. After this, in your senior years, you will get a new building. Fro...

reviews.review_heading: Great environment and support system, good academics, competitive lot.
reviews.review_text: The recent years have brought in significant changes in the infrastructure of hospital, college and hostel. A new superspeciality block caters to myriad of patients with improving diagnostic techniques. College classrooms have been made as to accommodate the huge incoming batches ahead. Both the men's and women's hotel have seen drastic improvement along the years with new blocks built.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college to gain knowledge and exposure.
reviews.review_text: The college has all the necessary infrastructure as determined by the government. It has an excellent patient load that helps in great clinical experience for students. All the labs are well-equipped, and the library serves as a wonderful resource centre. Hostels are decent, but they are not sophisticated. The mess serves nutritious food in both vegetarian and non-vegetarian.

faqs.question: How are the placements at Assam University?

faqs.answer: A:    According to the verified reviews of Shiksha the BSc placements at Assam Univeristy are considered decent by some students and alumni, while some of the reviews show the unsatisfaction towards placements cell. Hence, the placement at AU assam for the BSc course is considered mixed. However, the reviews claimed that the university offers internships to BSc students. Hence, candidates who perform well in internships and get a good skill set compatibility can get the placements easily.
faqs.question: What is the placement scenario for B.Sc at Assam University?

faqs.answer: A:    Assam University can be considered competitive as admission is based on the entrance exam scores. Courses such as BTech in Computer Science and Engineering are hard to get due to the high cutoff in JEE Main. For other courses, the university accepts the CUET UG exam. 50% of BTech seats are reserved for the permanent residents of Assam, and the remaining 50% are for All India candidates. However, admission also depends on academic performance and individual preference.
faqs.question: Is Assam University hard to get?

faqs.answer: A:     The Assam University reports successful placements over the years. At present,  60 companies took part in the placements 2025. At the PG level, the university offers MBA, MSc, MCA, and other courses to students. The university also provides PhD and various other courses to students.
