faqs.question: What is the latest expected JEE Main cutoff for the year?

faqs.answer: A:    There are many entrance examinations which candidates take to secure their seat in many of the MBA colleges, including Jawaharlal Nehru School of Management (JNSW) but the most popular entrance examination through which candidates, as well as colleges and universities, is Common Aptitude Test (CAT), whose ranks are accepted by numerous colleges/universities.Apart from CAT, other main entrance examinations lead to admission to an MBA at Assam University. These are CMAT, XAT, CUCET and WSAT, through which candidates can take admission in MBA at the above university.

review_content.Placements: The Gurucharan College provide a very good placement in our locality, that is Silchar. review_content.Infrastructure: The college in the first structure is very good and well-maintained. overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for the MBA programme at Assam University is inclusive of admission fees, caution deposits, examination fees, and many other charges for facilities provided by the university during the programme. overview_faqs.question: How is Assam University for CSE?
overview_faqs.answer: Computer Science Engineering at Assam University is one of the most opted domains by students. However, the placement records of BTech in Assam University are less compared to other state and central universities.But having said that, Assam University BTech course and especially the CSE discipline is far better than other disciplines provided under the BTech course through Assam University.Candidates willing to take admission in BTech in Computer Science Engineering (CSE) must take the JEE-Main exam. They should secure a good rank to become eligible for the counselling process at Assam University.

overview_faqs.question: Is there BTech available in Assam University?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Assam University offers BTech courses through its own college named Trigun Sen School of Technology. The university offers BTech across three specialisations i.e. BTech in Agriculture Engineering, BTech in Computer Science & Engineering, and BTech in Electronics & Communication Engineering.Trigun Sen School of Technology under Assam University accepts admission in the BTech course through JEE-Main exam followed by CSAB counselling. Therefore, students willing to take admission in BTech at Assam University must take JEE-Main exam.50% of the total seats in BTech at Assam University are reserved for permanent residents of Assam and remaining 50% are for All India Candidates.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees of BTech in Assam University?

individual_reviews.title: A dairy on the memory of Karimganj.

content.Placements: 50 students are placed in our course. The highest package of the course is 10 LPA, and the lowest package is 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are soap and detergent, chemical companies, etc. Every year, 10 percent of all students get internships in chemical companies.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available for students. A good infrastructure lab with all the necessary and advanced materials is available, and books are provided for the student. All the facilities for the students in the hostel are available, including a swimming pool, canteen, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Gurucharan College is really good for science.

content.Placements: Gurucharan College has maintained a strong reputation for placements over the years. Each year, around 30 to 50 students from different departments secure jobs, with a large share coming from the Science stream, as the institution is especially recognised for its Science education in the Barak Valley, Assam. Recently, the college has been upgraded to Gurucharan University. Last year, various companies like Infosys, Bajaj, Joi, etc., recruited students from our college.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities that are required to pursue college are available in your college. The classroom is very upgraded according to the modern classroom, all the facilities like digital board, projector, and a computer class are available. Other infrastructure like toilets, boys and girls common room and sport infrastructure, is also available.

admission_overview.college_name: Assam University Admission 2025: Application Form, Eligibility Criteria, Courses, & Dates

paragraphs: Assam University gives 86 courses in UG, PG, Certifications, PG Diploma, and doctoral levels through dfferent specialisations. Most courses given at the university are in the streams of Engineering, Arts, Social Science, and Commerce. Assam University accepts admission based on many national-level entrance examinations such as CUET, JEE-Main, and CAT, etc, and it also intakes candidates based on Assam University’s own conducted entrance exam.
Assam University Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection Process

Candidates eligible for the Assam University course admissions can register online through the university’s official website. Check out eligibility criteria, fees, and selection for some of the most popular courses at Assam University:

Assam University fees may include different components such as Tuition Fees, Admission Fees, etc. Students have to pay for a certain amount of fees at the time of admission. The given information mentions the Assam University fees for different UG & PG courses:
Note:The above-mentioned fee is taken from an official source/sanctioning body. Hence, it may vary.

Assam University offers PG courses via its campus and various affiliated colleges. Assam University seats vary for both on-campus and affiliated colleges. Find below the seat bifurcation for various courses offered at Assam University:
Assam University opens its doors to aspirants aiming to get admission to the programmes offered in 2025. The entire admission process is explained below:
Step 1: Assam University Application Process 2025
Step 2: Selection Rounds
Step 3: Merit List Release & Counselling
lists: Eligible candidates interested in seeking admission to Assam University for the academic year 2025 can register online through the university's official website.
Applicants must carefully check the eligibility criteria for the desired courses before proceeding with the application process.
The application form should be filled out accurately with all the required details and documents uploaded as per the instructions provided.
After completing the online application, candidates need to pay the application fee through the specified payment gateway.
Assam University offers admission to its various courses through multiple national-level entrance examinations such as CUET, JEE-Main, CAT, etc.
Candidates applying for different courses should appear for the respective entrance exams as per the eligibility criteria mentioned for each course.
The selection process may also include Assam University's own conducted entrance exams for specific programs.
After the completion of the entrance exams and evaluation of results, Assam University will release merit lists for various courses.
Candidates whose names appear on the merit list will be eligible for counselling sessions.
Counselling sessions will be conducted to facilitate the final admission process, where candidates can choose their preferred courses and complete the necessary formalities.
Selected candidates need to pay the prescribed fees to confirm their admission and secure their seats in the respective courses.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by Assam University?
faqs.answer: Assam University offers over 86 UG, PG, diploma, doctoral, and certificate programmes in various fields, such as Engineering, Arts, Science, and Commerce, and for admission in many of the courses and specialisation there are specific entrance exams such as CUET-UG for admission in UG courses, CUET-PG for admission in PG course, JEE-Main for admission in BTech course.Students need to prepare well for the aforesaid entrance examinations because having a good rank will ensure that the candidate becomes eligible for further counselling, followed by document verification and fee payment.

faqs.question: Does Assam University accept admission through CUET-UG?
faqs.answer: Assam University accepts admission through various national-level, state-level & university-level entrance exams. CUET-UG is also one of those entrance exams that Assam University enrol candidates.Students need to prepare well for the CUET-UG exam because only those candidates can register further for the admission process whose rank or scorecard will be within the range specified by the university, i.e. merit list, which will be released on Assam University's official website.Apart from CUET-UG, there are several other gateway exams for admission to Assam University, such as JEE-Main, CAT, WSAT, CUCET, etc.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in MCom at Assam University?
faqs.answer: Assam University accepts admission in MCom through CUET-PG, for which the candidate should have passed BCom with a minimum of 50% aggregate. Therefore, candidates willing to take admission in MCom at Assam University must take the CUET-PG exam and must prepare well to achieve a good rank because only those applicants whose rank is above the closing rank specified in the merit list released by Assam University will be considered for the counselling round followed by the document verification and fees payment.Also, 50% of the MCom course seats are reserved for Assam University internal students, i.e., those who have passed the qualifying examination from Assam University affiliated college.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

description: Assam University cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the Assam University JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

Assam University JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the Assam University CSE cutoff 2025 was 123330 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branch, such as ECE, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission was 193803, for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for admission.

For the General AI category students, the Assam University B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 123330 and 466849 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 123330 and 193803, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at Assam University. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at Assam University to understand the cutoff trends.

qs_world.description:
Assam University has been ranked well by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Through the years, the QS World University Rankings for Assam University indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the QS World University Rankings. It has been seen that in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2026, Assam University fell 250 ranks to #1001 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Assam University fell 90 ranks to #330 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

library.description: The University Central Library was established in 1994. At present, the Central Library has a collection of around One Lakh and twenty thousand books. It also subscribes to more than 400 Indian and foreign journals. Facilities provided by the Library include reading/ lending services, reference service, reprint service, literature search, photocopying, CDROM search. Besides these, access to internet is provided to students through 40 terminals. On line access to e-journals under UGC-Infonet, access to INFLIBNET Database service, access to DeLNET Database and Services and OPAC are also provided. The Library remains open from 9.30 am to 7.00 pm on all working days including Saturdays.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Karimganj CollegeReviewed on 16 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A dairy on the memory of Karimganj.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available for students. A good infrastructure lab with all the necessary and advanced materials is available, and books are provided for the student. All the facilities for the students in the hostel are available, including a swimming pool, canteen, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Gurucharan CollegeReviewed on 17 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Gurucharan College is really good for science.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities that are required to pursue college are available in your college. The classroom is very upgraded according to the modern classroom, all the facilities like digital board, projector, and a computer class are available. Other infrastructure like toilets, boys and girls common room and sport infrastructure, is also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by G.C. CollegeReviewed on 15 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Know the truth or G.C. College.
reviews.review_text: The college in the first structure is very good and well-maintained. The college upgraded its infrastructure from time to time, and all the facilities are available in our college, like laboratory, library, toilets and boys' and girls' common rooms. The educational equipment, such as a digital board, projector, computer room, desk and benches, is highly infrastructure-intensive.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Assam University, Silchar.
reviews.review_text: We have smart boards, projectors, and Wi-Fi for our department. We have good facilities in our hostel, and the food available is very good and up to our expectations, but the food sometimes is watery, and we cannot eat it without achaar with food, or we cannot eat, as canteens are available throughout the campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by N.C. CollegeReviewed on 31 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: About well role in education.
reviews.review_text: Smart board and projector are available in our college. Computers are also provided. Canteen is available but hostel is not available. Sports are done during academic year, and price distribution is also done at our college. Wi-Fi is also available at the college.

reviews.review_heading: All about Pharmaceutical Sciences of Assam University, Silchar.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not good for the B.Pharm Department, but the newly built MPHARM building is very advanced, and the hostels are also good. There are five boys' hostels and six girls' hostels available on the campus. Canteens are available almost in every department, and mess services are provided in each and every hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Central Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 28 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is very good. Location is little bit rural. Design department is the best in college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for our course is very good. We have AC labs and nice furniture. Lab facilities are good. But infrastructure of hostel is not good. Food quality is extremely bad. There are no medical facilities in college. Sports and games are very less supported by administration.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Lala Rural CollegeReviewed on 27 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: All things are good enough for me in college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility was good. Infrastructure was also good. Wi-Fi was also available. Classrooms were too good. Our library had many books to read. Canteen was also good. Medical facilities were available in our college, and usually in the winter season our sports were held.

reviews.review_heading: This is one of the best universities for the M.Sc. in Earth Sciences course.
reviews.review_text: There are a few small libraries and research centers on campus. The university lacks infrastructure compared to older universities, but it is good enough. The football team is recognized at other universities as well. The university has wonderful hostels, with vacant rooms. Water regulations ensure that buildings are adequately cooled even in summer.

reviews.review_heading: Review of my college and my college life, and how we enjoyed ourselves in college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great, but we don't have Wi-Fi connections. The classrooms, labs, and library are also very good. We have both boys' common rooms and girls' common rooms too, where we can play indoor games like carrom, chess, ludo, etc. In our college, we don't have hostel facilities.

reviews.review_heading: A good decision to take this college.
reviews.review_text: Everything is there, including Wi-Fi connections, books, science labs, and different classrooms for different subjects. Hostel food is good. The mess provides good food, and the security system is too good. There are medical centers that absolutely give free treatment and medicine. We have our own field for sports and games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Gurucharan CollegeReviewed on 16 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: GC University Silchar provides quality education, supportive faculty, and active campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of GC University Silchar is quite good. The classrooms are spacious and equipped with smart boards, projectors, and Wi-Fi access. The library is well-stocked with textbooks, reference materials, and e-resources, along with a digital library facility. Our department has modern labs (computer/science) with updated equipment to support practical learning. The hostel facilities are decent, with clean rooms, adequate water supply, and Wi-Fi connectivity. The mess provides hygienic ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Gurucharan CollegeReviewed on 31 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The golden days of my life.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good, and the college is engaged in advancing its infrastructure day by day. All the necessary equipment is available in the college, and the college is very reputable for its well-decorated facilities. It has all the required equipment, such as laboratories, libraries (which is a central library), a highly advanced digital board in each classroom, well-maintained toilets, and boys' and girls' common rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's good but not excellent.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is not that good. Three students are to be fitted into a room where it's difficult to live, as for Wi-Fi there is no Wi-Fi. But there is Wi-Fi in the library and campus. There are games and sports facilities but limited. Food quality in hostel is not good either.

reviews.review_heading: Not great for placements.
reviews.review_text: There are hostels but unfortunately new students probably won't get any room since lack of rooms. They get priority based on distance from the university to their home. One room can accommodate 3 students. There is no modern canteen. As for medical, there's only one, according to my knowledge.

data.description: Yes, Assam University offers separate boys' and girls' hostels. Assam University houses eleven hostels: five for boys and six for girls. The hostels are furnished with basic facilities. Along with the accommodation, the varsity also offers mess facilities to the students, which can be availed of by submitting a preference for a meal at the time of admission. Hostel seats are limited, and every student may not get a seat in the hostel. The availability of seats depends on the vacancy in the hostel.

admission_overview.college_name: Glocal University Course Admissions 2025: Applications, Eligibility, Selection Process, Fee, Dates

paragraphs: Glocal University admission 2025are both merit and entrance-based. The University offers around 80 courses at UG, PG, diploma, advance diploma and doctoral level under 14 different schools in the field of Management, Law, Engineering, Agriculture, Pharmacy, Arts, Commerce and many more. All the courses offered by the University are in full-time mode. Candidates are required to follow the specified admission process to get a chance at securing a seat in their desired programme.Glocal Universityadmission process for the session 2025-26 is ongoing.

Glocal University offers admission to UG and PG courses based on merit or national or state-level entrance exam scores. The university offers full-time courses for interested candidates. There are more than 80 courses incluing specialisations for candidates to choose from. Candidates can learn more about the university through the highlights table given below:
Particulars
Glocal University Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
https://glocaluniversity.edu.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

Admission to Glocal University's undergraduate and graduate programmes is determined by merit and results on the entrance exam for different course. Additionally, Glocal University administers entrance exams for MBA, LLM, and other course admissions. Class 12 is the minimum requirement for UG courses, whereas graduation is necessary to apply for PG programs.

The Glocal University entrance exam is used to select students for well-known programs like MBA and LLM. The eligibility and selection criteria for a few of theGlocal University coursesare listed in the table below:
Note:The information for the courses is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change

The whole cost of attending Glocal University includes several parts, including tuition, a caution deposit, test fees, and more. Tuition is paid annually, while other fee components, such as the caution deposit, are paid just once. Candidates are required to pay theGlocal University feethrough the means that have been made available. Check out the fee table given below:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The admissions procedure at Glocal University consists of several steps. Applicants must first submit an application for the course of their choice. The university's official website offers the application form online. Admission to courses at Glocal University is determined by entrance and merit. The detailed admissions procedure for Glocal University is described below:
Step 1: Glocal University Application Process 2025

Candidates fulfilling the eligibility requirements can apply online for Glocal University admission. As per the information collected, the application fee must be paid to register for a course. Candidates need to fill out the form and upload the specified documents to complete the application process.
Step 2: Selection Process

Glocal University shortlists candidates for most of the courses based on the merit of the candidate; they are required to appear for entrance exams for a few courses. The university considers academic merit for admission to courses like MA, PG Diploma, etc. The first level of selection after the application process will be either based on the entrance exam or academic merit.
Step 3: Document Verification and Fee Payment

Glocal University announces the names of the shortlisted candidates on a merit list following the conclusion of the selection rounds. These applicants are also contacted for document verification and counseling. To guarantee their spot at the university, applicants must pay the Glocal University fee.

faqs.question: How to get a seat at Glocal University?
faqs.answer: Candidates wishing to get a seat at Glocal University are required to follow the admission process that can be merit based or entrance based. Candidates must make sure to pay the course fee if they do clear the admission process that has been specified for their applied for course.Candidates are given a seat once all the admission rounds have been finalised.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Glocal University?
faqs.answer: No, direct admission is not available at the university. Entrance exams are used to admit students to many disciplines at Glocal University. To select applicants for BUMS, BAMS, MBBS, and other programs, the university accepts an admission exam. However, entrance to some non-centralized courses is determined by merit. Therefore, the candidate's results from the most recent qualifying exam are taken into account when choosing them for these courses.

faqs.question: What is the application mode at Glocal University?
faqs.answer: The University conducts admission thorugh online mode only. Candidates can fill the application form for all courses on the official website of Glocal University.

highlights.description: Glocal University has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #100 in the Pharmacy category by the NIRF 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, Glocal University outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is to be noted that the Glocal University's rankings in 'University' category have demonstrated stability in trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, Glocal University's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Pharmacy' category, the rankings of the institute have demonstrated an increasing trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, Glocal University climbed 1 rank to #100 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking.

reviews.review_heading: My Medical journey started in college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities of our university are really good. There are Wi-Fi facilities, and the classroom is well-organized. The libraries are also available, with a strong Wi-Fi connection. The food quality in the mess is awesome compared to various other private universities, but here, you will get only vegetarian food.

reviews.review_heading: My medical journey started in college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities of our university are really good, like Wi-Fi facilities, and the classroom is well organised. Libraries are available with a strong Wi-Fi connection. Food quality in the mess is awesome compared to various other private universities, but here you will get only vegetarian food.

reviews.review_heading: My journey started from here.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities of our university are good like Wi-Fi facilities, classrooms that are well-organized, and even libraries are also available with strong Wi-Fi connections. Food quality in the mess is awesome compared to various other private universities, but here you can get only vegetarian food.

reviews.review_heading: Very good infrastructure and I love this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the department is very good, and Wi-Fi and labs are available. The size of the classroom is big and equipped with air-conditioning. Library is also available. Hostels are very good, we have a bed, table, chair, and cupboard available. The only problem with the hostel is the food in a mess, it is very bad in summer. Medical facilities are also available. Our college also conducts sports like cricket, basketball, football, table tennis, kabaddi, etc.

reviews.review_heading: My personal opinion about my college, its infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are all facilities available in our college like Wi-Fi, air-conditioned classrooms, a library, everything is fit and fine. Students really enjoy studying here. Hostels are very good. Students get tables and chairs for self-study and a comfortable B.Ed for good sleep, but the food in the mess during summers is very bad. They give the same food for days, so students get bored eating the same food. In winters, the food is good enough to eat. Sports also happen in our college like cricket, vol...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Glocal University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. The North India campuses are good. I recommend joining the hostel. The hostel is good. The food served in the mess is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has excellent infrastructure. Our college environment is pleasant. The hostel facilities are good. The food served at the hostel is healthy. The library is good and huge. Our classrooms have smart technology. Our lab has updated instruments.

reviews.review_heading: Glocal University is in disarray because several senior and faculty members have resigned.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the infrastructure is good. The campus is more than 350 acres. It is a fully green campus near Shivalik hill station.

reviews.review_heading: I got lots of love from faculty members and friends.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good infrastructure. The college has Wi-Fi, labs and classrooms. The canteen food quality is good, but the prices are moderate. Sports are conducted by students.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college has very good infrastructure. It has an elegance that offers a soothing effect on sanities. The university is equipped with state-of-the-art infrastructure and facilities. The air-conditioned classrooms, language lab, computer lab, gym facilities, an open-air theatre and multi-cuisine food court, super-specialty hospital shall leave fond memories of sustainability alongside knowledge creation. The classrooms are spacious, air-conditioned and equipped with the latest audio-visual equi...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with excellent environment to study.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is very good. There is a huge library and a lot of books for all needs are available. Classrooms are very good and there are audio and video visual classes. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. There are very good hostels. We have three to four canteens and medical facilities are also available as it is a medical college.

reviews.review_heading: The management is not good, but other than that, everything is fine here.
reviews.review_text: Facilities here are good enough with a good infrastructure. Our college has labs with around 20-30 systems in every lab. Classrooms are huge enough to make students feel free to study in, and the library is the best. The library has enough space, and any book related to the course is available for students to make them learn better. Hostels are also fine, but not much good. As I not a hosteler, but I came to know from my classmates that the hostel rooms are good, and the food is served on time. ...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of college management, and faculty.
reviews.review_text:
1) Good and big classrooms, nice infrastructure, good labs, good library. 
2) Hostel facility is very good. Quality of food is very good, medical facility available. Sports facility available cricket, football and many other games were played in the University.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has excellent faculty members but poor management.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was good, but it needs to be developed. Our college provides decent Wi-Fi facilities. Classrooms and labs are well-equipped. The library was well-stocked only for some departments. The food offered in the mess and canteens was decent. A full-fledged hospital is also available on the campus. Sports facilities were average.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the campus and teachers, but not with the students.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available everywhere in the college. Labs are open till 8 pm for the students to carry out research work. Most of the tools are available in labs. All PCs have proper specifications like 8 GB RAM, i5 processors, etc. Quality of food is very good, and it is of less cost. Hostel rooms were fully air-conditioned. I haven't faced any problems during my tenure.

data.description: The university is equipped with fully furnished separate hostel facilities for boys and girls. The hostels are specially designed with two primary objectives of safety and comfort. It has round-the-clock security, stringent security procedures and comfortable apartments that our students enjoy living in. The hostels have state-of-the-art washrooms (toilet and bathing cells). Cleanliness is maintained by the staff on duty. Each hostel room provides an amiable atmosphere and pollution-free environment, conducive to the mental, physical and spiritual development of the students and helps them become self-reliant. Each Hostel (separate for boys and girls) in the university is self-contained with amenities such as a reading room, an indoor games room, a lounge and a dining hall with a mess.

paragraphs: The total fee for BPharma course at Glocal University range from INR 1.8 Lacs - INR 4 lakh. Candidates must pay the BPharma course fees to finalise their admission. Glocal University course fees might include components other than the tuition fees. The fee information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Glocal University offers BSc and BSc (Hons) in nine and three specialisations, respectively. All the programmes are offered in a full-time mode for a course duration of three to four years. The total tuition fee for the BSc course ranges from INR 1.77 Lacs to INR 3.20 lakh. For admission to the BSc programme, the final selection for all these programmes is based on meeting the minimum eligibility criteria. The minimum eligibility criteria is that the candidate must have passed Class 12 from a recognised board.

The total tuition fee for the BAMS course offered by Glocal School of Ayurvedic Medical Sciences is INR 15 lakh. The duration of the programme is 4.5 years including a one-year internship programme. The qualification needed for the BAMS programme is a pass in an intermediate programme with Chemistry, Biology, Physics, and Sanskrit. The candidate must pass Class 12 from a recognised board. The minimum age limit is 17 years.
